The plant, animal, and human worlds meet around earth and fire, depicting the continuous cycle of change and renewal. Suitable for all ages, including very young children. A wordless choreography.

profiles.name: Children's parade – gather at 4:15 PM
profiles.description: The story has been told, but it's not over yet. The Wandering Company invites everyone to join in, because now it's your turn to continue the journey. Together, we will set off in a festive parade, heading towards a place where searching can transform into finding. Not because all questions have been answered, but because you can experience together how it feels to finally arrive somewhere and feel at home. From the village square to the crater, the procession moves forward, singing and dancing, with the Wandering Company, the Storyteller, and Mr. Cricket leading the way. There, in the crater, everything falls into place for a moment: the search comes to an end, the world becomes warm and festive, and "home" is no longer just a question, but a place where you can stand and celebrate together.

profiles.name: The story: with the characters of the parade.
Saskia Schmink
profiles.description: Here, imaginations come to life. The makeup team transforms children into whatever they can dream of – from magical creatures to brave adventurers.

profiles.name: Filosofisch kabinet
profiles.description:
Theme of the day:

Out of nowhere, The Wandering Company appears: three mysterious beings, a creaking caravan, and traces of a life on the road. Insects? Travelers? No one knows for sure, perhaps even themselves. One question has driven them for as long as they've been wandering: where is home? Today, they invite you to join their search. The day consists of 3 parts. First, the company appears, right in the middle of an interactive theater moment. Then, their story, "Onward to Home," comes to life through a narrative that unfolds before your eyes. And at the end of the day, everyone departs together in a festive children's parade, the ritual that transforms searching into finding home.

The Wandering Company appears:
With a creaking, rattling sound, the caravan rolls onto the square. Curious eyes look around: where have they ended up? The Wandering Company is on its way, as always, looking for an answer it hasn't yet found. This place is just one stop along the way; nothing more, nothing less. But exploring an unknown world isn't something you do alone; they need your help…

profiles.name: Interactive Theatre: With the characters of the parade!
Friction - Compagnie Fô-Pá
profiles.description:
"A gem cannot be polished without friction, not a man perfected without trials."

Company Fô-Pá; Hans Mets and Marieke Drent (also known as La Familia Volante) began creating a new performance during a residency at Trust Collective in Portugal, where they live in the winter. Friction. The starting point of the creative process was their own relational and interpersonal dynamics. They are driven to bring raw, authentic emotions from real life onto the stage through physical theatre, clowning, acrobatics, and contact improvisation dance. This year, they have continued the process, and you will see the result in a Try-Out performance here. The performance is thematically aimed at adults and older children. As there are staged fights, a minimum age of 6 years is recommended.

profiles.name: Soulsong
profiles.description:
Lex Empress
 Versatile and innovative – never the same: that's Lex Empress. To understand what she does, you have to see her perform, as no performance is ever the same. She creates interactive experiences where the audience is at the center. With singing in 7 languages, with over 4 octaves of range, and a deep belief in the potential of humanity, she opens hearts and minds like no other.

Soul Song: Personal Music Mirrors For You
 "Soul songs" are personal songs transmitted live, reflecting the state of each individual. Together with pianist Gillian Baracs, who has now created around 9000 personal songs in seven languages worldwide, with deep musical skill and intuitive listening, we are happy to offer this again and welcome everyone who feels called to receive their song.

profiles.name: Verwonderworkshop
profiles.description:
Wonder for both big and small people:

A small, strange object lies in the center. We hear soft harp music. Big and small people are building a world that didn't exist before. Branches become towers, boxes become houses, and what initially seemed meaningless turns out to be full of stories. Those who look closely will see it happen. Those who participate will discover more.

profiles.name: The "Sounds Factory" & The "Make It Up As You Go Along" Game
profiles.description:
Juliska Yonne writes and performs her own songs, accompanied by the piano. She also creates music and theatre performances where children are invited to play, discover, and create.

The "Geluiden-Fabriek" (Sound Factory) & The "Het Verzin-Het-Ter-Plekke-Spel" (Make It Up As You Go Game)
Step into a cheerful workshop full of movement, sound, and imagination. Together, we play with sounds, invent the craziest ideas on the spot, and discover what emerges when we look at each other and listen carefully. There is no right or wrong here, only the magic of the moment.

profiles.name: Trammelant in sprookjesland
profiles.description:
Improvisational Theater with Daphne Zandbreg.
 Soul Song: Personal Music Mirrors For You

Trammelant in Sprookjesland is a cheerful and musically-themed performance where children and parents are invited to play together in the Ruigoord children's tent. Where do those winding paths lead? What wonderful creatures will you encounter? And... who will you be today? Together, we will bring the most exciting, beautiful, and magical stories to life!

profiles.name: Más - La Familia Volante
profiles.description:
La Familia Volante, consisting of Marieke, Hans, and Yara (8), is a circus family that spends the winter in Portugal and travels during the summer, enjoying various festivals with their acrobatic clown performances and family acro workshops.

Màs!

This acrobatic family loves to play, throw, and tumble...and is always looking for playmates. Who wants to join them? They will perform their interactive, acrobatic clown show, Màs, which could even turn into an acrobatic playground for the whole family... After the performance, there's time for everyone to play together and learn acrobatic tricks from the family!

profiles.name: The Puppet Circus
profiles.description:
Create your own circus performer for the puppet theatre. Will it be a tightrope walker, clown, acrobat, or perhaps even a lion tamer? With all sorts of materials, you'll give your puppet its own unique personality and story.

Is your artist ready for the big performance? Then step behind the puppet theatre and join in on the "Puppet Circus". Together, we will bring a colourful circus show to life!

profiles.name: Eric, the magician behind the curtain.
profiles.description:
Eric the Magician will appear and disappear again around the Gnome House Stage (Kabouterhuys) at Landjuweel. Hearing, seeing, smelling, tasting, feeling, and thinking are the ingredients of a magician. Eric creates his own illusions; he doesn't like to let them go and loves to involve you in them. Beyond the smoke and mirrors, there is room for attention, and before you know it, you are spellbound. You don’t need to wear a red hat to be a Gnome.


 With Landjuweel, Eric the Magician will reappear and disappear around the Kabouterhuys Stage. Hearing, seeing, smelling, tasting, feeling, and thinking are the ingredients of a magician. Eric creates his own illusions; he doesn't like to lose them and loves to make you part of them. Beyond the smoke and mirrors, there is room for attention, and before you know it, you are spellbound. You don’t need to wear a red hat to be a Gnome.

profiles.name: Festival Make-up & Makeover with Shotgun Cilla
DJ Captain Spank
profiles.description:
Happy/melodic/up-tempo dance world-music.
 (Ska + Balkan + ElectroSwing + Tribal + Oriental + Rockabilly + Punk + Flamenco +++…) I often have musicians playing live during my sets to add an extra beat/sound (sax/percu/etc...)

profiles.name: DJ Captain Spank b2b DJ MacGyver 2.0
The Rebels' Club: Julius Joker & Erwin Mulder
The Rebels' Club: Maxi McNaughty & Erwin Mulder
Origins: Krien Jozeph & Merante Tamar & friends
profiles.description: Landjuweel Sunday at the Kabouterhuis is the secret garden of exquisitely curated songs & sounds. Origins: Krien Jozeph will open his treasure chest of eclectic, deep, heartfelt and dancy rhythms & melodies, while Origins: Merante shapeshifts her way through this sea of sultry sound…

profiles.name: Voices Revelation
profiles.description: Soul and gospel as it should be: full of fire, groove, and soul. Voices Revelation delivers a performance that is powerful, energetic, and moving. Expect strong vocals and deep harmonies.

profiles.name: Bring the Joints
profiles.description: Bring The Joints is a hip-hop band that combines rap and live instrumentation to create its own unique sound. With the powerful flows of rapper/guitarist Ahih Jaihi, deep bass lines from Fretless Jane, energetic drums, the colorful keys of Reezus, and warm sounds from saxophonist Robert, the band creates dynamic live experiences full of character and musical freedom.

profiles.name: Gotcha & Katherina – Folk songs from Georgia
INOYSON & ANYA [Hybrid Live DJ set]
profiles.description:
You are invited into a universe of lucid dreams through a Hybrid Live DJ set, offering a new perception of spiritual electronica, neoclassical trip-hop, acoustic techno, psychedelic avant-garde and alternative jazz fusion.
 INOYSON is the lucid dream universe of a film composer, multi-instrumentalist, producer, vocalist, songwriter, painter and consciousness explorer.
 INOYSON’s style is cinematic music for imaginary films — soundscapes you can see in your mind while listening to this musical voyage.
 This time at magical Kabouterhuis, experience a new program «Soul Flames Groove» together with DJ ANYA.
 Tomas Mazoes joins on percussion.
 See you there, dear souls.
 Links:
 Facebook 
 Instagram 
 Spotify 
 Youtube

profiles.name: Juliska
profiles.description: In the program, "it's about now," Juliska Yonne sings and plays piano with Frans van Diemen on trumpet. The music alternates between lyrical, rhythmic, and quiet passages. The lyrics are poetic and philosophical-theatrical. They take you along on this moment, to encounters, streets, hands, and houses, together, birds, transience, love, letting go, yourself, your imagination.

profiles.name: Kidd Nebula
profiles.description:
Eccentric FUNK, combined with Jazz and Hip-Hop inspired by great legends like Funkadelic/Parliament, Prince, James Brown and Jamiroquai. Kidd Nebula & The Voodoo-Funk Conspiracy transform every stage into a safe space for human connection through art, passion, and cosmic vibrations. This energetic six-piece band, fronted by Kidd Nebula, will take you on an intergalactic journey with heavy grooves and humorous themes that will sweep your feet off the dance floor!
 After releasing their new EP “BAD CHI” featuring four summer anthems, the band achieved their first international success during their seven-show EUROTOUR, playing packed venues in Prague (CZ), Budapest (HU) and Zagreb (HR). These Popronde (2026) selectees are making waves in the urban scene with their healing funky vibrations, opening for (international) names like Primaat (NL), Boukou Groove (USA), High Fade (SCH) and Prince bass player Ida Nielsen (SU).

 Excentrieke FUNK, gecombineerd met Jazz en Hip-Hop, geïnspireerd door legendes als Funkadelic/Parliament, Prince, James Brown en Jamiroquai.…

profiles.name: Destroying the Last Horcrux
profiles.description: Voldemort is back again and trying to eat all the trannies. Come with us and learn some spells to fight against the Dark forces of life. You’ll go through a wonderful adventure filled with surprising encounters and surrealist creatures. We’re looking for other trashy witchxs and wizardx! We need you to start the revolution!

profiles.name: Intimate haircuts
profiles.description: Intimate Haircuts aim to give your junk the funky twist Landjuweel calls for. Ranadhira reshapes, bleaches, colours, paints and decorates your pubic area to create an unforgettable art piece. Find your favorite hairdresser in the KALEIDO Faerie Forest!

profiles.name: Poetry Consults
profiles.description:
Feeling lovesick? Despondent? Forlorn? 
 Dr. Oxytocin's poetry consults are open for business! Come get the lock on your heart fixed by inhaling their intimate poetry and 'a completely safe dose' of Oxytocin. Come check out their tent, hiding in the KALEIDO Faerie Forest!

profiles.name: Tattoo Station
profiles.description: Ideally, I prefer to do tattoos for friends and family of friends, or people who meet through friends. For you, I can (Lot) create a symbol of love or fire on your body. Come by and let me adorn you with a unique piece!

profiles.name: Transform Yourself
profiles.description: Yes, it’s true: a KALEIDO Make up artist is waiting for you in the Faerie Forest! Feel like transforming into something feisty, freshhh or just friggin’ sexy? Your vision is their gasoline!

profiles.name: Angel Tarot
profiles.description:
BASJE reads Angel Tarot

What do the angels have in store for you?
BASJE invites you to a relaxed and accessible angel card reading. With a fresh perspective, warm presence, and a generous dose of intuition, you can draw a card from the Angel Deck and then discuss it with BASJE. This is not fortune-telling, nor are there any grand promises. Instead, it's about finding a moment of quiet reflection or perhaps even intense contemplation. Perhaps this is exactly what you need.

Angel Tarot works with gentle, encouraging messages. The cards focus on growth, choices, and what lies within you. Ideal for those who are curious but not yet ready for traditional Tarot. It's a great starting point. The angels offer encouragement and never lie. Of course, experienced Tarot enthusiasts who want to explore the power of the angels are also welcome.

profiles.name: GUTEN ABEND
profiles.description: GUTEN ABEND is back, and once again he invites you into his pixelated virtual world, where he blasts nu-disco, synthwave, house and indie dance. There's a whole lot more KALEIDOVERSE left to explore, and GUTEN ABEND is your musical guide for this chapter of the journey. Recommended but not required: fast sunglasses and anti-gravity suits.

profiles.name: XOTO
profiles.description: XOTO brings energetic beats to the Queer Stage to make you DANCE!

profiles.name: Prime Time Power Throuple
profiles.description: Embark on a bilingual journey through television. We're your favorite interactive talk/game/reality show and our "commercial breaks" aren't bad either!

profiles.name: Smooth Awakenings
profiles.description:
Let yourself be gently carried away by the calming piano tunes of KALEIDO’s piano virtuoso Tim Wray. 
 Tim Wray
 Tim is a pianist, composer and accompanist who believes in the power of music to shape soundscapes and create surreal, dreamlike emotional experiences. Tim's unique qualities are his use of live, musically-driven visuals and the ability to improvise based on the mood and feeling of the space around him. Tim has performed at a number of queer festivals and community events, and believes in the joy and power of music to create and shape the spaces around him.

profiles.name: Stray Elf
profiles.description: Stray Elf weaves intricate tracks to create an elevated mood on the dancefloor. Taking you to all sorts of magical places with trippy beats and psychedelic atmospheres!

profiles.name: The Maxitaksi
profiles.description:
'Keep the meter running, because I'll take you places you've never been before' Like hearing your favorite songs mixed with some new beats being played while you are driven around, The Maxitaksi creates an energetic live DJ set through an eclectic combination of NYC house, disco, neo soul, electro and a sprinkle of vogue beats. 
 Join the dance floor, consensually grab a person to grind, dance and scream along with the music. You are at the destination you never knew you needed to be.

profiles.name: Till Glitter Do Us Part
profiles.description:
What exactly *is* a wedding? A group of people gather together. Some words are spoken. Rings may appear. Tears may be shed. A kiss is encouraged. Somehow, everyone agrees that something profound has happened. Weddings are wonderfully strange. A collective performance that we have decided to take very seriously.

In true KALEIDO fashion, "Till Glitter Do Us Part" lovingly embraces the absurdity of matrimonial ritual while celebrating the very real magic of love, devotion, friendship, desire, and chosen family. Expect a campy, queer ceremony where sincerity and nonsense walk hand in hand down the aisle.

Whether you're hopelessly romantic, deeply skeptical, gloriously single, legally married, emotionally entangled, or simply curious, you are warmly invited to witness (and perhaps participate in) this joyful exploration of commitment, chaos, and collective imagination. Come for the vows. Stay for the glitter. Leave questioning everything you thought you knew about weddings. No gifts required. Excessive enthusiasm is encouraged.

profiles.name: DJ Try/Me
profiles.description: DJ Try/Me presents: Dance Music for Birds of Paradise. Gender-blending & genre-bending.

profiles.name: The Great Reproduction Show
profiles.description:
Do you think nature is neatly divided into man, woman, and traditional romance? Then think again! Biology teacher Sven and his incredible assistant Hester will take you to the strangest, most anarchic corners of the animal kingdom.

When a stiff "Bible Belt" couple takes the stage to proclaim that all modern sexuality and gender identities are "utterly unnatural," Sven and Hester intervene. What follows is a hysterical, visual, and slightly vulgar escalation featuring flamboyant paradise birds, trans-clown fish, headless rooster, and dominant hyenas.

This absurdist theatrical performance proves that Mother Nature is the greatest gender bender on Earth. Leave your preconceptions behind, be fluid, and celebrate mating!

profiles.name: DJ Summer
profiles.description: Expect fast beats, cheeky vocals, and pure dance floor energy. DJ Summer's playful style and infectious vibe will have you bouncing from Bottom to Top.

profiles.name: Embrace your No-Talent by Malle Wally
profiles.description:
Put on your red nose, because Malle Wally is bringing clowning to the Queer Stage on Sunday! But be warned: Malle Wally is hungover.

Part of this free-spirited celebration is our famous Kids' Catwalk at 4 PM! Will you let yourself be surprised, or will you be the surprise yourself?

profiles.name: Embrace your No Talent by you?
profiles.description:
At this very last hour of performances at the Queer Stage, ANYTHING GOES. But there’s a disclaimer: We’ll be totally and creatively worn out, so we cannot guarantee quality on any level.
 Host? To be determined…

profiles.name: Kalaudo
profiles.description:
Welcome to the world of La Lau. The biggest Non-Talent at KALEIDO? Is it time for a KaLauDo? Can this unrefined performance queen actually pull it off?

In this performance, Lau will attempt to open her show. But our chaotic "All Days, Every Day Diva" has 500 ideas for a possible opening and simply can't choose, even due to the critical eye of the new dramaturg. So she just does them all anyway. Expect unhinged characters, makeup that a toddler would do better with, Britney-worthy amateur performance, chaos, G-A-Y, lots and lots of attempts.

profiles.name: Spiritual Battleground
profiles.description:
What is the true path to enlightenment? Will you try to save the world? Or turn inward to save yourself? In other words: Will you start by healing the world or healing yourself? 
 In this spiritual No-Talent Show, spiritual superstars Jomanda and her nemesis Chakra Khan will lift you to a higher frequency. When it really comes down to it, what do YOU believe will set you free?

profiles.name: Molly Cules
profiles.description: As a chemistry teacher, Molly Cules likes to mix things up! He combines bouncy beats, cunty flair and some spicy meringue into one set. Shake your slutty hips, lose your voice and prepare for a PARTY.

profiles.name: DJ Babette
profiles.description:
Emerging from the queer underground - home base Vrankrijk - DJ Babette (who just entered his 50s) discovered his passion for DJing quite recently. Hellbent on squeezing every last drop out of his midlife crisis, his sets carry that extra punch of urgency of someone arriving a lil’ late to the party.
 Babette chases after bouncy, captivating grooves on the house/tech house/indie spectrum, infused with funk, latin, disco, homosexualism and elusive, quirky and euphoric twists. You’ll be going places for sure!

profiles.name: Eli Lux
profiles.description:
Your professional bedroom dj, ready to serve up some juice! Eli likes to brighten up rooms with a good portion of bass, infused with the right amount of light cheekiness. You can surely leave that to her, as founder of the Peacock Garden, safe haven of hedonistic paradise birds. 
 Her musical choices form a magnetic mix of housey bounce, dirty beats and all the feels, wrapped up in a delicious story into the senses. 
 Driven by the desire to bring people closer together in a world of separation, she uses her feminine superpowers to create ripples of love, moments of marvel and beauty all around. She creates an inviting atmosphere and pushes the boundaries of free expression on dance floors and beyond. Enjoy, my darlings!

profiles.name: K-Faeries Training
profiles.description:
How can we party amidst the rise of techno-fascist-myso-genocide? If you're feeling guilty, I (tbh) love to break it to ya, but your hedonistic escape is an illusion. This is happening to you too. The revolution begins at cellular level, and we're all alive & in power.
 But fear not - the K faeries are here to help - together we'll dissociate from those barriers of perception, to embody the world that lies beyond.

profiles.name: BINGO!!!
profiles.description: Grab your moment to catch your breath, and the only chance to chase some bingo balls at the Queer Music Bingo! Expect a lineup packed with queer bangerz, glittering prizes and fabulous host Brie to guide you through it all. Whether you’re in it to win it or just here for the vibes, you’re guaranteed a good time.

profiles.name: Embrace your No-Talent: Talkshow Time
profiles.description: On Sunday afternoon, chaos erupts at the Queer Stage. Matthijs van Ruigkerk invites the audience to showcase their (lack of) talent and create the highly popular "The Queer World Keeps Turning" show together. Would you like to be his guest on stage? Are you willing to participate in an in-depth interview? Or will you be the musical guest? Matthijs is known for setting a high standard, so will you jump or will you limbo?

profiles.name: EnkiDoeMaar
profiles.description:
As one of the founders of the No-Talent collective KALEIDO, Enkidoe is the main programmer of our Queer Space. And since they love trying something new, why not a DJ Debut?!
 In true No-Talent fashion, expect a DJ set that is undefinable, unexplainable and totally incomprehensible. Bring your earplugs and leave your expectations at the door, cause you’ve probably never heard such a hot mess.

profiles.name: Flirting for people who are terrible at it
profiles.description: This workshop is for LGBTQ+ individuals who sometimes feel lost when it comes to flirting. It’s easy to get frustrated when you feel your flirting skills aren’t where you want them to be. But let's find ways to rediscover the joy of authentically connecting with people! With like-minded individuals, we will share positive experiences, practice together, and design our own experiment to test things out during Landjuweel.

profiles.name: Dragtivism Workshop
profiles.description:
With fellow queer activists, the House of Extinction will collectively explore our views on the (history of + contemporary) drag scene and ways to - sustainably - do drag. To fuel this potential and spread like an ethically produced olive oil stain, they will host a safer learning space for queer people and allies coming together, liberating themselves in this art form and smash the capitalist cistem, one stiletto heel and make up brush at a time. 
 House of Extinction
 The House of Extinction, allegedly the first explicitly climate activist drag house in the Netherlands, unites a sustainable, conscious practice and fabulous, otherworldly art in their drag. While our species is still here, they believe we should be vehement in our demand for change and passionate about community building and empowerment. To make this vision happen, they cherish queer joy during their eclectic performances on the street and in the club next to hosting dragtivist workshops. Looking drop-dead-gorgeous to the very end, your HoE's will lipsync for all life on Earth!

profiles.name: Relating in the Dark
profiles.description:
What do you notice when you stop looking?
 By exploring intimacy without sight, we will delve into our intuitive nature, sharpening our capacity for deeper connection. We will use blindfolds to invite you into profound contact with your physical sensations and internal reality, unlocking both sensuality & vulnerability.
 Laurie King
 I'm Laurie (he/him), a queer British-Kiwi whose current home-base is Berlin. My passion is creating spaces that cultivate healthy, thriving human-to-human relationships, helping people take off their masks, feel their sensations and celebrate their aliveness on Earth. 
 Since 2019, I have organised and facilitated hundreds of Authentic Relating, Dating and Embodiment workshops in Oceania and Europe. My training includes Authentic Revolution, The Embody Lab, World Peace Yoga School, the Connection Institute, ISTA and Body Electric. I have facilitated at internationally acclaimed festivals such as Stretch and Ignite and organisations such as ART International.

profiles.name: Self-Touch & Sensual Flow
profiles.description: A playful and grounding space to explore self-touch, sensual movement, and self-connection. Through slow dance and guided awareness, you’ll reconnect with your body and its rhythms. We close with an optional cuddle puddle, inviting warmth, consent, and shared softness.

profiles.name: Authentiek & verbindend communiceren
profiles.description:
My name is Yente, and I have a great fascination for human relationships and language.

How often does it happen that the words you use come across very differently to the other person than how you intended them? It's such an art to become aware of the language you use, so that it can help you in fulfilling your needs. The non-violent communication model can bring clarity and serve as a means for expressing yourself better or understanding others better. In this introductory workshop, you will learn about this model and practice using it.

profiles.name: Bang. Boos. Bedroefd. Blij.
profiles.description:
BASJE guides: Afraid. Angry. Sad. Happy.

In this workshop, we explore the full depth and breadth of human emotion. BASJE will take you through all four basic emotions. We create space for what is, without judgment or haste. Because emotions are not obstacles, but information, and they want to be seen and given space!

This workshop is for everyone, whether you are used to going deep or just starting to discover what is within you. Together, we will create a safe and open space where it is okay to be afraid, angry, sad, and happy.

Come as you are. In this workshop, you will actively explore all four emotions yourself. You will emerge renewed.

profiles.name: Bewegende Lijnen
profiles.description: In this workshop, we will explore drawing and movement to discover our creative side. Through surprising and fun exercises, Jana brings together children of all ages. Children up to the age of 10 will participate under the supervision of adults.

profiles.name: Consent Bingo
profiles.description: WALLY presents: Consent Bingo! In the first half, playful exercises help participants feel their own boundaries and practice verbal and non-verbal communication. Using our “toolbox” of ways to express desires and boundaries, we then play Consent Bingo! Your bingo card features different types of touch, from holding hands to kissing and more. Do you dare to ask for what you want?

profiles.name: Get Painted
profiles.description: Let’s experience this first Landjuweel night in style! Two of our most experienced make up experts are waiting for you in the Rietreat to turn your face into a version of yourself that cannot wait to meet you!

profiles.name: Improv-Theater
profiles.description:
Step into the world of improvisational theatre and discover the joy of being present, playful, and connected. This beginner-friendly workshop invites you to break out of your "human nutshell" through fun games, creative exercises, and spontaneous storytelling. 
 No experience needed, come as you are and bring a willingness to play.

profiles.name: Kids' Catwalk
profiles.description: During the "Kids Catwalk," children of all ages can participate in the fashion show. Rietreat boasts a huge collection of clothing, and under the watchful eyes of world-renowned stylists Mannish Pixel and Hester, the children will be transformed into true supermodels. Parents are expected to provide the most enthusiastic audience imaginable.

profiles.name: Landing Yoga
profiles.description:
Need a moment to land into the weekend and into your body? Join us for some grounding Hatha yoga, an ancient practice that harmonises movement & breath through a series of longer held āsanas (poses). A gentle yet empowering homecoming to the Self. 
 Laurie King
 I'm Laurie (he/him), a queer British-Kiwi whose current home-base is Berlin. My passion is creating spaces that cultivate healthy, thriving human-to-human relationships, helping people take off their masks, feel their sensations and celebrate their aliveness on Earth. 
 Since 2019, I have organised and facilitated hundreds of Authentic Relating, Dating and Embodiment workshops in Oceania and Europe. My training includes Authentic Revolution, The Embody Lab, World Peace Yoga School, the Connection Institute, ISTA and Body Electric. I have facilitated at internationally acclaimed festivals such as Stretch and Ignite and organisations such as ART International.

profiles.name: One-Line Art workshop
profiles.description: Discover how a single continuous line can become a powerful tool for creativity, self-expression, and connection. Led by multidisciplinary artist Saeed Zamzam, this interactive workshop invites participants to create spontaneous one-line drawings, explore them through color, and share the stories behind their artwork in a welcoming environment. No artistic experience is needed; just curiosity and an open mind. Suitable for all ages, the workshop offers a relaxing and inspiring experience where art becomes a universal language that connects people beyond words.

profiles.name: Peacock Garden Mini Retreat Bubble
profiles.description:
A tiny escape with yoga, art, bubbles, music & good people. Find our reed retreat �� for a sweet way to glide into the weekend. Spoil yourself with care and connection and leave our bubble extra bubbly �� 
 All paradise birds extra super welcome. 
 18.00 – 18.45 Lazy Girl Yoga by Medooki
 19.00 – 19.45 Empathy Art by Emmy-Koos
 20.00 – 20.30 Face Massage by Kira
 20.30 – 21.00 Bubble Art Demo by Medooki 
 21.00 – 23.30 Sørenda (DJ) 
 23.30 – … Peacock b2b2b2b2b with Eli Lux, DJ Bubbles, DJooki & …

profiles.name: Pup & Cat Play: An Introduction
profiles.description:
Have you ever wondered what the world looks like through the eyes of your loyal four-legged friend?

Join this workshop for a playful introduction to pup/cat play. Although pet play is mostly known from the fetish and kink community, in this workshop we approach it from a non-sexual setting. BDSM therefore plays no role here. The focus is on play, imagination, and channeling your inner animal: its instincts, energy, and way of moving. Sensuality is welcome, but the emphasis is on pleasure, relaxation, and play.

Pup BoBo will share together with their kiddo pup Ozzy what puppyplay means to them, how a pup, cat, or pet persona can emerge, and how to enter the right headspace. After all, the way animals guard their boundaries and express their desires can be surprisingly instructive. More of a cat person than a puppy? This workshop is for you too. BoBo’s counterpart BeauBeau will also be there to support the kittens.

We will end the workshop with an open petplay era, where you can play, explore, or simply observe in your own way.

profiles.name: Queer Platonic Speeddating
profiles.description:
Queer Platonic Speed Dating is a fun space to meet new people without romantic pressure or awkward expectations. Through a series of short, guided encounters, you'll connect with other queer individuals who are also open to friendship, community, and unexpected connections. Come as you are! Whether you're curious, shy, chatty, or somewhere in between, you might leave with a new friend, a future collaborator, or simply a really lovely conversation. This event is for anyone who feels comfortable with or curious about their queer identity – no one is excluded!

Maud Verdam
Maud is a Ruigoord native who has experienced many different scenes and loves trying new things, even when they feel a little scary. She believes that every place, person, and experience deserves to be approached with fresh eyes. With the same curiosity and openness, she hosts Queer Platonic Speed Dating: a fun space for meeting new people without romantic pressure. Come as you are! You might leave with a new friend, an unexpected connection, or simply a lovely conversation.

profiles.name: Siren Rising
profiles.description:
Siren Rising is a small, intimate workshop for up to 25 people who are ready to explore their sensuality. Through music, movement, and play with clothes, accessories, and textures, you'll begin to understand what sensuality actually feels like in your own body, rather than according to someone else's definition of what it should or shouldn't be.

This is a space to let go of self-consciousness and embrace your own personal kind of sensuality. From there, we explore how to channel that energy into a room, into a gaze, into the space between bodies. This is a safe, supportive, and non-judgmental environment where you are actively encouraged to be more than you think you can be, and most importantly, to leave feeling incredibly sexy!

profiles.name: Making slime
profiles.description: Step into a magical lab where slippery dreams come true! During this fun workshop, which is easy to enter and exit, children (and adults who still want to be kids) will dive into the magical world of slime. Come play, get messy, and enjoy your own homemade slime creation!

profiles.name: Isis &  Mozes
profiles.description:
Isis & Mozes is a musical duo from Ruigoord, known for their performances at Landjuweel and Maanzin, among others. DJ Isis van der Wel and producer/multi-instrumentalist Mozes Meijer met each other exactly 10 years ago at Landjuweel, and they are celebrating this special occasion with you!

After the famous Beeldenroute, they will step behind the turntables together starting at midnight.…

profiles.name: Dolle Nina
profiles.description:
Nina Beem is an experience designer, poet, performer, host, and burlesque artist. At Ruigoord, she was featured in productions such as "The History of Burlesque," "Erotische Poetry Experience Vurige Tongen," and as a tour guide for "Field Trip Through the Cosmos." Not just a presenter on stage, but a creator of connections. Nina creates performative encounters where people feel seen, touched, and connected. During Landjuweel, she offers three special interactive experiences:

Grateful Lab: A playful and lighthearted experiment in gratitude. Through small encounters, questions, and rituals, visitors are invited to connect with the field of gratitude. Because where attention goes, energy grows. And perhaps a small quantum field of creation, abundance, and love opens up there.
 Fruity Refresh Station: A mobile oasis full of refreshing fruit, loving attention, and unexpected compliments. A short stop for body and soul, where visitors can recharge with fresh summer fruits and love before continuing on their way.
 Sun Queen: A ritual group performance in which spoken word, ceremony, and ritualistic burlesque come together…

profiles.name: Aggy Lou
profiles.description:
Do you know that feeling when you blink awake on a reckless Sunday morning? Sun kissing your skin, glitter stuck to your cheeks, sparkly souls dancing around, and nothing on the agenda but feeling the beat, sipping something cold, and vibing with the beautiful mess of it all. That’s Aggy’s rhythm. That’s the vibe she builds. With a flick of the wrist and a cheeky grin, Aggy spins sets that feel like sunshine with a side of sin. Funk-laced, disco-dipped, blues-soaked, and peppered with gospel vocals and sneaky edits, her sound doesn’t ask you to dance—it dares you not to.
 Old-school gems cozy up next to gritty urban textures and genre-blurring surprises that keep you guessing (and sweating). But be aware:
 Don’t get too comfy basking in the Sunday glow. Aggy’s not afraid to flip the switch—dragging you from sparkly daydreams into pulse-racing twilight.
 Think: tribal rhythms, deep dirty basslines, jacking house, and bold- as-hell energy that can shake the glitter right off your cheeks.…

profiles.name: Meraki
profiles.description:
BORN IN BRAZIL, PEDRO SUGIURA MUSIC HAS A HUGE INFLUENCE OF HIS CONTINENT'S RICH DIVERSITY OF RHYTHMS. CURRENTLY LIVING IN AMSTERDAM, MERAKI HAS A UNIQUE IDENTITY AND PRESENTS A VERY ENERGETIC SOUND SIGNATURE. THE ARTIST HAS TRACKS RELEASED WITH NAMES LIKE DANDARA, SPANIOL, SALVADOR ARAGUAYA, GERRA G KOTOE AND OCTO SHARK
 BEGGINING HIS MUSICAL EXPERIENCE IN PSYTRANCE AS A TEENAGER LISTENER, AND LATER GETTING IN TOUCH WITH DOWNTEMPO AS A DJ, HE STARTED HIS JOURNEY WITH THE BRAZILIAN CREW SONIDO TROPICO IN 2016.
 ALWAYS SEEKING BALANCE BETWEEN THESE TWO CONTRASTING STYLES OF ELECTRONIC MUSIC, HIS MIXES ALWAYS RESULTS IN A FLOWY AND GROOVY ATMOSPHERE.
 MERAKI DID A EUROTOUR IN 2017 PLAYING IN 8 DIFFERENT COUNTRIES AS LISTED BELOW. DURING THE LAST YEARS IN BRAZIL, HE WAS CONSTANTLY PLAYING AMONG THE UNDERGROUND SCENE PARTIES AND FESTIVALS
 HIS LAST JOB WAS A RESIDENCY AT AMATA VENUE IN BRAZIL.
 Links:
 Facebook 
 Soundcloud 
 Instagram

profiles.name: Mona Pirzad
profiles.description: Coming from a diverse artistic background, Mona’s music aims to explore both the profound and the lighthearted aspects within a single experience. Her musical style is clearly influenced by Berlin's deep house sounds, but also carries the influence of her Persian heritage and her experiences as a traveler.

profiles.name: Kahmeya
profiles.description:
Kahmeya (DJ/Producer/Singer) – 'Let's create an energy where we can connect, share, and enjoy freedom together.'

Step onto the fiery dance floor of ‘Little firecracker’ Kahmeya. This Dutch DJ/producer & vocalist will take you on a rhythmic journey. Her DJ sets are filled with indie dance and organic/tribal house records. Connect with the driving grooves, ethnic influences, psychedelic elements, and live vocals of Kahmeya.…

profiles.name: REO MATSUMOTO- DJ Set with live Handpan
profiles.description:
REO MATSUMOTO's captivating DJ / LIVE Hybrid Set are rooted in a unique blend of Ethnic & World music grooves with Afro House,Deep House and Organic House, incorporating deep tribal rhythms, Street spirit and psychedelic elements.
 His signature Hybrid Live set is enhanced by live instrumentation, featuring the HandPan, beatboxing, and percussion, creating a seamless DJ/Live hybrid set. REO’s performances promise to take music enthusiasts on an uplifting, mesmerizing, otherworldly journey.

profiles.name: Reve & Jessy
profiles.description:
Jessy (MC)
 Jessy is a meditation guide, coach, and explorer of consciousness who is passionate about creating spaces for presence, connection, and self-discovery. Through guided meditations and inner exploration, she invites people to slow down, reconnect with themselves, and remember what truly matters.
 Inspired by courage, awareness, and the wisdom that already lives within each of us, her sessions offer a gentle invitation to come home to yourself, exactly as you are.

Reve (DJ)
 Revé is a dancer, choreographer, and DJ. Drawing on her Surinamese roots and 20 years of world touring dance experience, she has developed a methodology called Energy Systema, which creates ceremonial music and movement waves to ground, uplift, and transform energy levels. This methodology is accessible through classes, dance parties, and her DJ sets. Her passion is to empower people to embrace their natural, primary energy and expression.

profiles.name: Alex Covert
profiles.description:
Alex Covert
Alex Covert is a multidisciplinary artist based in Amsterdam. Through performance, painting, and sculpture, she explores the space where opposites meet: darkness and delight, devotion and mischief, vulnerability and power. Her work often begins with big questions and ends somewhere unexpected – less interested in answers than in play. After all, if creation is a game, perhaps God just wants to join in.
You can see more of her work on Instagram: @alexcovert.art
Anastasiya
Anastasia Prokhorova is a multidisciplinary artist, founder of Artwear Amstel Bleach, and creator of the “I see your frequency” immersive experience. Working from within systems of consumption, she treats language, materials, and the body as reused data: marked by ambition, desire, and labor.

profiles.name: Steven de Peven
profiles.description: Laat je verrassen!

profiles.name: INOYSON : The Spiritual Journey Beyond Consciousness
profiles.description:
INOYSON’s style is cinematic music for imaginary films — soundscapes you can see in your mind while listening to this musical voyage.
 This time at Church, experience a new program «The Spiritual Journey Beyond Consciousness» together with DJ ANYA.
 You are invited into a universe of lucid dreams through a Hybrid Live DJ set, offering a new perception of spiritual electronica, neoclassical trip-hop, acoustic techno, psychedelic avant-garde and alternative jazz fusion.
 Tomas Mazoes joins on percussion, while Sylvia Nantier presents a cinematic dance performance.

profiles.name: Bon bon Vivant extravaganza
profiles.description:
We welcome you for an extravaganza closing of the Bon Bon Vivant stage.
 Step into a surreal Sunday night celebration where music, movement, cacao, the energy of guayusa and surreal storytelling come together in one immersive gathering.
 Throughout the festival the Bon Bon Vivant unfolds like a living chocolate ritual; stirring, melting, mixing, and transforming day by day. As the music fades at the stage just before midnight, a mysterious procession moves across the festival grounds. Drums, pots and pans echo, performers dance through the crowd, and we are all guided toward the church for the final chapter. Inside, the space transforms into the dreamlike Chocolate Factory: a world of rhythm, theatrical chaos and the awakening of the Cacao Goddess... An unforgettable closing ceremony where indulgence, imagination, and togetherness literally melt into one.
 Performance & music brought to you by Nadia Innocentia, Coen Aerts, Zevende Kleur , Daniel Liddiard & Leon Row

profiles.name: Maurício Lobão
profiles.description:
Maurício Lobão is a musician and percussionist with over 40 years dedicated to the art of sound. His journey is marked by a deep connection with global rhythms, exploring diverse instruments and musical languages that cross cultures, territories, and states of consciousness.

Throughout his path, Maurício has traveled to many countries, absorbing influences and experiences that enriched his musical expression. His work seamlessly bridges electronic and acoustic music, creating unique soundscapes that converse with both ancestral and contemporary realms.

More than just performance, his music is a lived experience. Inspired by the elements of nature—earth, water, fire, and air—Maurício crafts rhythms that evoke connection, presence, and harmony. His sounds not only entertain but also invite introspection and inner balance.

Recognized for his sensitivity and versatility, he uses percussion as a universal language, capable of uniting people and awakening states of healing and expansion. His art is an invitation to feel, listen, and reconnect with the essence of life through sound.…

profiles.name: DIZZI GEETHA - LIVE SET
profiles.description:
Dizzi Geetha is a Queer POC artist from Sri Lanka, based in The Netherlands. Dizzi is an artist, creator, producer, composer, multi-instrumentalist, theatre maker, DJ and ceremonial facilitator. Their work is largely shaped by their love for nature and our planet, as well as their history of displacement and finding roots through sonic soundscapes. This gives their creations in music and theatre a truly unique and organic element that shapes the experiences of both the viewer and listener, rather than simply being consumed.

Links:
Instagram 
Spotify 
Website

profiles.name: The Art Jewel on Friday
profiles.description:
Curators / host Q&A: Bo van der Meer & Roswitha de Boer - Zuiderveen

New at the Landjuweel Festival! A fine selection of Dutch documentaries that capture the essence of artistry, community, identity, and freedom. Step into the church, put on your headphones, open your eyes, and immerse yourself in the stories that breathe the free spirit of Ruigoord. Including Q&A with the filmmakers: from up-and-coming talent to established names. Friday, July 24 | 12:30 - 13:30

All Backwards (13 min)
Two performance artists explore the fear of the unknown by walking backwards for 600 kilometers on the Camino de Santiago, the famous pilgrimage route in northern Spain.
Afterword with directors Merette van Hijfte and Samuel van Keeken

Bewogen (22 min)
Our body is a treasure chest full of memories. Three dancers bring memories of home, freedom, and loss to life through dance, music, and words.
Q&A with director Noa Zevenbergen

First time (7 min)
We experience the new life of a 5-year-old girl. The experience is captured in a poetic way, allowing us to see the nuances in emotions that we normally miss.…

profiles.name: The Art Jewel on Saturday
profiles.description:
Curators / host Q&A: Bo van der Meer & Roswitha de Boer - Zuiderveen

New at the Landjuweel Festival! A fine selection of Dutch documentaries that capture the essence of artistry, community, identity, and freedom. Step into the church, put on your headphones, open your eyes, and immerse yourself in the stories that breathe the free spirit of Ruigoord. Including Q&A with the filmmakers: from up-and-coming talent to established names. Saturday, July 25 | 13:30 - 15:30

Cheek to Cheek (24 min)
On the dance floor of the Danspaleis, loneliness and old age seem not to exist. A film about the power and vulnerability of aging, dancing, and music.
Q&A with director Bo van der Meer

Daifonie (7 min)
In this animated documentary, three people share their experiences during the pandemic. As it turns out, they find comfort in the same way, through music.
Q&A with directors Selle Inti Sellink & Mirjam Debets

Sterre (22 min)
The 11-year-old artistic talent Sterre wants nothing more than to be accepted into the School for Young Talent. During inexplicable headaches, she finds comfort in art and drawing.
Q&A with director Catherine van Campen…

profiles.name: The Art Jewel on Sunday
profiles.description:
Curators / host Q&A: Bo van der Meer & Roswitha de Boer - Zuiderveen

New at the Landjuweel Festival! A fine selection of Dutch documentaries that capture the essence of artistry, community, identity, and freedom. Step into the church, put on your headphones, open your eyes, and immerse yourself in the stories that breathe the free spirit of Ruigoord. Including Q&A with the makers: from up-and-coming talent to established names. Sunday, July 26 | 12:30 - 14:00

Sneak Preview: Paradise Birds (17 min)
A street artist, a dog walker, and a sea captain fight for their survival and freedom in a city that is rapidly gentrifying and losing its edges. For Landjuweel, we're taking you into this world with a sneak preview.
Q&A with directors Debra Barraud & Luca Lange

Outside the Lines (5 min)
Short animated documentary in which three young queer people share their experiences of deviating from cis-heteronorm.
Afterword by director Stan Oversteegen

Sex Sirens (26 min)
The ballroom scene is a safe haven to find and express identity, sensuality, and sexuality.…

profiles.name: Inner Child Garden
profiles.description:
Welcome to the Inner Child Garden (Innerlijke kinderspeeltuin)
A moment to ground yourself, connect with your younger self, and let your inner desires run free. Come as you are, embrace the flow, and let’s meet the child within!

profiles.name: Join the Cult of Guru Lui Delulu
profiles.description: A 45 minute parody show to hold auditions for the new KALEIDO Kult for the klininally unhinged and untamed. Featuring a new 10 commandments all queered up and sex positive, conversion therapy hypnosis, lip-syncs and performances and a closing ritual.

profiles.name: Awakening Dance
profiles.description: A communal experience to connect with each other and the church through dance, steps, and beats to start the day.

profiles.name: Move & Play: Buddy Fitness
profiles.description: Grab a buddy, old or new, and let’s move! KALEIDO is turning the church into our very own little queer movement playground. It’s for every body and every level, so forget the rules and let’s have fun. Come move to the beat, shake off the week, and celebrate the skin you’re in. And who knows, you might even find your new festival bestie!

profiles.name: The Altar of Flesh
profiles.description: Offer all your body parts to the Cult and lube yourself to pure pleasure...

profiles.name: JXSSX
profiles.description: Jxssx, aka Jesse, knows how to musically fire up a dancefloor. His sets are like journeys crossing different atmospheric landscapes, ranging from more deep and organic to extatic, always with elements of fun and surprise. He is a storyteller in sound, with meticulously knitted sets that have a sense of rave at the core.

profiles.name: Pull & Power
profiles.description: In this improvisation theater workshop you are invited to discover within yourself the desire and the retraction. Based on the method you will explore how your body reacts to pursuit and caution. Through theater improvisation exercises you will come in contact with one of the main complexities of giving life to a character who (usually) experiences some kind of conflict. Dive into playing and finding out how you react to being empowered and how to embody power.

profiles.name: Julietta Vendetta
profiles.description:
‘ Closing in style’ 
 There's something special about closing a night at a festival like Landjuweel. The crowd, the vibe and a dancefloor that's ready for anything. I'll be taking KALEIDO out with a set woven from Goa, Tribal, Groovy Techno and Trance. Music that builds and breathes. It's going to be a proper journey from first to last beat. Come ready to move and let's close this one together in style.

profiles.name: CERA
profiles.description: CERA has become a familiar face at KALEIDO. Last year, she almost took over the Queer Space stage, so that promises something... CERA is known for being an energetic and enthusiastic DJ, always looking for the right vibe: sometimes with recognizable tunes, sometimes high-energy, or even layered and eclectic. Expect sexy house, disco, and occasional world music influences, but above all, expect lots of fun and queer joy!

profiles.name: Beccc
profiles.description:
Being a seasoned performer under Shady Lady has now given Beccc the opportunity to go back to her USB and play the heavier sounds she never played before. Think hard-house grooves and 90s rave sprinkled into her classic driving energy. 
 Beccc will turn the KALEIDO takeover of the church to a whole new cosmic level.

profiles.name: Church of the Untamed
profiles.description:
Leave your inhibitions at the door and enter the Church of the Untamed. Join the unholy communion of dance, mischief and collective joy. 
 Through a guided, interactive dance ritual, we’ll unleash our wild and expressive selves. Let's drop into our bodies, come alive together and let life loose through the limbs. 
 Come and celebrate every part of you, the primal and the playful, the sacred and the savage, the fabulous and the feral. 
 All creatures are welcome here.

profiles.name: Connective tissue
profiles.description: A collective ritual of connection guided by XOTO from KALEIDO. Expect lights, music & intensity. Perfect if you want to feel connected to a higher plane of existence. Until we let the dance floor explode with energy together!

profiles.name: Trash Skeleton
profiles.description:
My name is Trash Skeleton (she/her), and I'm a trans-anarcho playwright based in Amsterdam.

I work on participatory theatre where the idea is that I have a script that is performed by audience members who have never seen the script before. The scripts are comedic, grotesque, and surreal, with the hope that the readers will break character as they try to say out loud the insane things I've written for them. I am also a character whose role is to provide stage directions.

I continue to write these plays in order to serve the communities I cherish and to decentralize theatre. It's a language spoken by all of us, and it shouldn't be restricted by "professionals". I also love providing my theatre for free or on donation. After all, it's for the people, by the people!

profiles.name: Kiss My Knoblauch
profiles.description: Naked slugs, cockroaches, ketchup, and toxic armpits presented by Fishra (she/her) and B.Ruiz (they/them) in a stew of gothic utopias and pungent criticism. Expect fast-paced words over heavy beats and catchy synth tunes with trumpet flourishes. A wake-up call to shake you awake, a lullaby to soothe you. Keep your eyes moist, keep your fists clenched.

profiles.name: Fooi
profiles.description: Fooi is an Amsterdam-based rock band that plays like a great evening at the pub: unpredictable, fun, sometimes vulnerable and raw. Since June 2024, the 5 friends have been meeting in the secret studio under the cafe where they first met.

profiles.name: Uitzendbureau
profiles.description: The agency is currently causing chaos in Amsterdam. More specifically, the group around frontman Valdo has even established its own venue at Paradiso. Unfiltered, extraordinary riot music: screaming about the queen, dystopia, and the established order. Sounds excellent. No need to do anything further.

profiles.name: L.A. Sagne
profiles.description:
L.A. SAGNE. It’s energetic, it’s intense, it’s passionate, and when it starts playing, it makes everything move.

Are you still allowed to say in an official biography that a band is just a group of friends? No. But you don't need to either. You can hear it in every song. Friends? Yes. But the kind you wouldn’t want showing up unannounced at your mom’s birthday party.
 How they met is none of your business. Just be glad they did.
 Or not, if you don’t like punk.
 Anyway! 2025 was a good year for L.A. Sagne. Festivals like Eurosonic/Noorderslag (NL), Trans Musicales (FR) and Best Kept Secret (NL), a club tour in the Netherlands and Belgium and many other places and people all got what they deserved. Three booking agencies (Friendly Fire – NL, Live Nation – BE, and Persona Grata – FR) joined in. And as you read this, the band just finished recording their debut album 'Good Company' which will be out on March 27th 2026 accompanied by a club tour through The Netherlands and Belgium.…

profiles.name: B2B Solame vs FTGRL
profiles.description:
FTGRL and Solame, will take you to the promissed land and over the rainbow high in the sky. Expect funny, fast and hard dance music that will put a smile on your face, but will shake your body into pieces.
 Genres: Latin-Tek, Gabber, Hardcore, Hyperpop

profiles.name: Zibabu
profiles.description: Zibabu is a space punk adventure through the multiverse. A bizarre extraterrestrial duo that navigates between jazz, hardcore, metal, punk, psychedelic rock, hip hop, and more. They are engaged in an endless battle against evil and decay. Two aliens crash onto the stage in the church of Ruigoord. Don't come looking for peace and serenity; instead, find an indescribable ball of energy that never stops bouncing.

profiles.name: Anxiety as a Gift
profiles.description:
Farah Shretah, also known as Alien Mama (Kikvors Collectief)

"Anxiety as a Gift" is a ritual in which the subconscious becomes a shared journey of moving images created by you, designed by your attention. A body stands inside the circle, carrying hidden storms that surface as vivid visual landscapes.
What was meant to remain unseen begins to unfold: fragments, memories, symbols, and inner signals made public. Through the collective gaze, anxiety is transformed from a private shadow into a shared living image.

Farah Shretah is a Syrian transmedia artist, filmmaker, and XR producer based in Amsterdam. Her work spans across places, languages, and forms: born in Syria, shaped by her life in Ukraine, and later rooted in the Netherlands, where she completed her master's degree in visual culture and artistic research.

As the founder of Alien Mama Productions, Farah creates immersive works at the intersection of emotion, technology, AI, biofeedback, performance, and storytelling. Her practice transforms inner states such as fear, anxiety, and memory into shared audiovisual experiences, inviting audiences into poetic spaces where vulnerability becomes image, movement, and collective presence.

profiles.name: HONOUR*REVIVE*SHARE - The Workshop
profiles.description:
Cato Coebergh, Sana van der Linge (Kikvors Collectief)

In our current fast-paced and materialistic world, we often overlook the waste we generate on a daily basis. At our workshop, we encourage people to view their waste in a new light: We will honor its history, and furthermore, we will revive it through a creative process. Sharing our stories and creations with each other.

Cato Coebergh: People produce far too much waste on a daily basis. Cato Coebergh addresses this issue as an artist by making conscious material choices and creating mindfulness workshops to raise awareness about the topic and offer new perspectives on everyday life.

Sana van der Lingen: Sana is a visual artist who combines traditional crafts with innovative techniques to create layered art and design objects. Her work ranges from graphic design and mixed-media prints, in which she primarily focuses on working with historical heritage, to diverse objects such as accessories or household items made from recycled materials, ceramics, and textiles.

profiles.name: Lizard Yoga
profiles.description:
A grounded journey from the egg to the scaly lizard basking in the Sun.
 Unmesh Joshi, Yoga Practitioner for 15+ years
 Bioplastic costumes with sustainable decorations: Lara Wijnker and Mees Muijs.

profiles.name: Marcia's Metal Masquerade
profiles.description:
Marcia Verwoert (Kikvors Collectief)
 Build your own mask, build on the shape of your face and create a new identity. We will be using metal wire and maybe even other materials.
 What do you want to hide behind?
 Or how do you want to be seen?
 Im Marcia, the bozeheersbeestje. I love to work with a variation of different metarials - metal wires but also fabrics. I love colours and welcome a bit of chaos in my looks. My inspiration comes a lot from nature and spirituality.

profiles.name: Duin
profiles.description:
Duin is a poetic performance featuring nude models filmed up close on stage. These images are projected live and accompanied by cellist Tjalle Rens, creating a transformative and mesmerizing landscape.

Sam van Zoest is a filmmaker and writer. He draws his inspiration from the relationship between humans and nature.

profiles.name: Nevula and the Dragon's Tale
profiles.description:
And they lived happily ever after… This is how the story begins.

In the smoldering crater, an ancient dragon lies. Not as a prisoner, but as an ally to a princess who escaped the castle with her. They climb precariously high above the clouds, searching for something that was lost.
High above the clouds lives the daughter of the wind spirits, weaving dreams from mist. Yet, something is still missing in her life.

Can these extraordinary messengers rekindle the fire?
Fairy tales, cosmic rhythms, dance, fire, and collective ceremony.

profiles.name: The Elements Fellowship
profiles.description:
The Elements Fellowship is more than just a band – it's a living expression of global sounds. A kaleidoscope of music, stories, and connection, where cultures, rhythms, and hearts come together in improvisation.

Their performances are intuitive, immersive, and unforgettable. They don't just entertain — they transform.

profiles.name: JPattersson
profiles.description:
Hips sway on waves, feet bounce to pumping beats in the sand, imagination dives into dubby depths for shimmering synthesizer pearls. Suddenly, the sound of a trumpet breaks through the stereo panorama like sunbeams through a dense canopy. Welcome to the world of JPATTERSSON.
 In this world, genre boundaries are not limiting but liberating: Driven by hypnotic rhythms, powerful basslines and melancholic harmonies, JPATTERSSON crafted a unique style that is both progressive and diverse. Some tracks pulse with latin heat, while others flirt with jazz. Always dope and extremely danceable. Then there’s his singing voice – raw, soulful and energetic – delivering smart lyrics over catchy melodies and electronic patterns.
 Step into JPATTERSSON’s universe and you’ll embark on a journey filled with elevating joy and emotional depth. Here, music speaks a universal truth that connects us all.
 Let go and dance!

profiles.name: Esta Polyesta
profiles.description:
Esta Polyesta is a DJ and music producer known for blending Global Beats, House, Electronic, and World Music, creating uplifting and funky sets that merge ethnic rhythms with electronic sounds.

Her style is flowing, feminine, and fun, always aiming to guide her audience to a shared peak experience. She chooses music that connects cultures and fosters collective joy through dance, reflecting her belief that "Dance is a celebration and a ritual." As a pioneer in ethnic house and Ecstatic Dance, she blends ancestral, acoustic, and world sounds with electronic beats.

Since starting her career in 2005, she has performed at major festivals and venues worldwide. She also collaborates with DJ Mashti as Polyesta, producing popular remixes like Oum's Lik, which has over 7 million plays on Spotify.
 Links:
 Soundcloud 
 Listen to Ecstatic Dance sets: [Soundcloud] 
 Video on Ecstatic Dance [Youtube] 
 Video on Ecstatic and Trance Dance [Youtube]

profiles.name: Kayva van Gangelen & Piet Jan Blauw
profiles.description:
For the Landjuweel Festival 2026, Kayva van Gangelen and Piet Jan Blauw are joining forces in a unique artistic collaboration. While Blauw combines electronic soundscapes with projected images and immersive atmospheres, Van Gangelen brings her own, refined sonic world as a hobois player. Together, they present an atmospheric ambient set where organic sounds, improvisation, and stillness come together.

Their performance explores the space between music, image, and imagination. The warm tones of the hobo intertwine with atmospheric electronic layers and subtle visual projections, creating a meditative experience that invites reflection, wonder, and connection.
Kayva van Gangelen
Hobo player Kayva van Gangelen can be heard on Leonard Cohen's posthumously released album "Thanks for the Dance." As a musician, performer, and maker, she has been working at the intersection of experiment, improvisation, and contemporary music for years. She founded the Dutch ensemble Perforator, played with The Kyteman Orchestra, and is a member of the Berlin ensemble Stargaze.…

profiles.name: Dansjewel : Inphiknight
profiles.description:
Dansjewel offers a raw and intense take on ecstatic dance. A playful adventure full of contrasts: light-hearted yet profound, playful and adventurous, but also rooted in ancient traditions. Dive into the Kosmies Lek and let your dancing flow! Immerse yourself in the endless source of music, and allow the rising tones to resonate deep within you, shaping your inner self and bringing you to life! Break down the waves of sound into a prism of movement and transform yourself into a true Dansjewel.

Eccentric, eclectic, and ecstatic: DJ INPHIKNIGHT, or Thomas Meijer, weaves tapestries of music spun from his extraordinary and idiosyncratic collection of curious records from all directions. Authentic, classic, futuristic music brought together in a frenzy with deep-vibrating beats and jazzy improvisations.

Links:
Instagram
Soundcloud
Website

profiles.name: ROOTEDANCE
profiles.description:
A somatic dance experience of ancestral rhythm and Earth reconnection

Rootedance is more than just a dance class – it's a ritual in motion. A space for deep, free movement where the body becomes drum, root, and prayer.
This performative practice awakens the senses, inviting the body to be explored as a living territory of memory and transformation. Inspired by Afro and Latin rhythms, Rootedance unfolds as a guided sensory journey where inner pulses are awakened, energy centers are activated, and the sacred bond with the Earth is restored.
More than just a technique, Rootedance is a safe space for self-exploration. Music and movement serve as sacred tools through which each participant is invited to inhabit their body, breathe deeply, and remember themselves as part of the living pulse of the planet. It's dance – but also release, prayer, and rebirth.
Designed for physical theatre festivals, somatic laboratories, and interdisciplinary performance spaces, Rootedance bridges tribal rhythm with inner awareness, activating a collective embodied experience that reclaims the body as home and temple.
Estimated duration: 75–90 minutes…

profiles.name: Eline Bierling & Mame N'Diack: The Intention
profiles.description:
Eline Bierling
 Eline Bierling (33) is a singer-songwriter, violinist, poet, and creator of musical experiences that resonate deeply within the listener's core. Connection – with oneself, with others, and with the greater whole – is central to her work.
 In 2019, she released her Dutch poetry album, followed in 2021 by her first Dutch singer-songwriter album.
 Through her violin, guitar, singing bowls, piano, and especially her voice, she creates a deeply meditative and emotional field. The layered vibrations of all her instruments, combined with her warm and intuitive voice, gently guide listeners inward, touching subtle and often unspoken layers within the body and nervous system. Her singer-songwriter music (in her native language: Dutch) is personal, open, and carries a healing quality that invites recognition, release, and inner calm.
 Mame N'Diack
 Mame N’Diack (47) is The Rhythm: vivid, expressive, and deeply rooted – he makes the timeless tangible.
 With his Senegalese roots in rhythm and voice, he brings an earthy, grounding presence to the performance. His musical expression adds depth and movement, supporting and expanding the emotional landscape created in the moment.…

profiles.name: Oh Voyage
profiles.description:
Rotterdam-based duo Oh Voyage, takes listeners from the streets of Istanbul through the sunset into lightly dimmed nightclubs. Growing up in Istanbul and traveling endlessly through their music, Oh Voyage is an homage to the nomadic spirit of their ancestors as well as the drifters of our modern age.
 The duo’s unique sound blends Anatolian folk music with analog synthesizers into an emotional voyage, showcasing the duo's passion for bridging cultures through music on the dancefloor.
 Having played many shows around major cities throughout the world, Oh Voyage keeps delivering goosebumps and unforgettable live shows to loyal fans and new listeners. Their innovative approach is both fresh and rooted in their virtuosity of live instruments with electronic music productions.

profiles.name: Wasim Arslan
profiles.description:
Wasim Arslan is a Syrian-born artist who channels the spirit of Aleppo through the vibrant energy of Amsterdam, where he resides.

He transforms classical Arabic melodies into something that resonates – Levantine rhythm, cinematic depth, and contemporary production.

He has established himself on stage: over 150 performances, a live band, and venues that feel like one cohesive entity.

His sound is rooted in heritage and nostalgia, representing a new generation of Arab music crafted for global audiences.

profiles.name: Jimmy Moon
profiles.description:
Jimmy has always been interested in different genres of music. From a very young age, he was inspired by genres such as rock, classical, Latin, and electronic music. Jimmy was born in Segovia, Spain, and at only 7 years old, he began studying percussion and classical music, which led him to play in several orchestras and, later, in various bands, touring the country and performing classical and rock music. It wasn't until he was 14 that Jimmy first heard EDM and instantly fell in love with the genre. Starting to produce and play soon after, his ambition to transmit his energy and creativity in his sets, has led him to play in different international clubs, such as Club Womb (Tokyo), Singel Klub (Basel), Club Atelier (Amsterdam), and Club Hart (CDMX), and to be part of the line-up of reference festivals such as Amsterdam Dance Event in 2023 and 2024, where he performed at Q-Factory and Baut.
 Between 2024 and 2025, Jimmy relocated to Saudi Arabia, a move that would prove pivotal in his artistic journey. Immersed in the rich textures of Arabic music and sound culture, he drew deep inspiration from the region's sonic heritage, weaving new influences into his already eclectic palette.…

profiles.name: Origins: Krien & Merante  Heroine’s Journey
profiles.description:
Origins: Krien & Merante create ritualistic, interdisciplinary art experiences at the intersection of performance, music, poetry, nature, and myth. Our performances are a vehicle for transformation—personal, ecological, and collective. In a world that sometimes seems to be drifting away from its roots, we build experiences where people can reconnect—with themselves, each other, and the greater whole.
 The Heroine’s Journey is an immersive, theatrical ceremony, inspired by and based on the mythic Hero’s Journey, as described by Joseph Campbell, and is performed in 7 chapters. Become a fellow traveler on a journey that takes you from your home grounds into the wide world and its temptations, through the ‘dark night of the soul’, to emerge wiser from it.
 For Landjuweel 2026 Origins: Krien & Merante will work together with very exciting collaborating artists: the mystical Gurdjieff Quartet, ritualist Myrgon, captivating sarangi player Vincent Swierstra and aroma jockey Odo7, who will accompany the heroine on her journey.

profiles.name: Dansjewel : Laura Jayne
profiles.description:
DJ Laura Jayne blends her warm and spicy dance floor cocktails, mixing percussive electronic beats with synthy African vibes, Brazilian & UK funk, catchy garage, and all-time classics, with a twist of global bass and tribal dubby electronica.

Her international journey through time and space is sure to surprise you and take you on a trip through her musical selection of gems, getting you into a free flow of embodied explosion and playfulness.

Laura is known for her energizing global groove sets that she plays at festivals with DJ collectives such as the Bankra Bike Soundsystem and Moonshine Sound Collective, where live music is incorporated into the dance sets.

As a co-founder of FreeFlow, she loves hosting festival stages with musician and DJ families at venues such as Tivoli, Paradiso, Couleur Cafe (Brussels), and Zwarte Cross.

profiles.name: AfroMix
profiles.description:
Avalon Brown

Avalon's love for African dance began when she lived in Rio de Janeiro. She was inspired by the joy on the faces of the dancers and the freedom they experienced while dancing to the powerful percussion. To learn more and deepen her understanding, she traveled extensively throughout various African countries and within the African diaspora to study traditional dance styles.

She brings these experiences into her own AfroMix classes and performances.
It's a mix of different African dance and music styles. The movements are earthy, expansive, intense, and uplifting.
It's about letting go and releasing your energy. And finding your power! POWERRRR!!

profiles.name: INOYSON : Lucid Dreams Universe
profiles.description:
INOYSON is the lucid dream universe of a film composer, multi-instrumentalist, producer, vocalist, songwriter, painter and consciousness explorer.
 This year, the INOYSON band will perform their Lucid Dreaming Voyage, featuring new compositions and special guests Thierry Ganz and Kidd Nebula.
 Sebastian Vega will join on bass, Thimo Gijezen on guitar, and Frank Hopman on drums.
 ANYA will also join with an intuitive movement performance.
 INOYSON’s style is cinematic music for imaginary films — soundscapes you can see in your mind while listening to the artist’s compositions.
 In this creator’s music, you can hear a fusion of symphonic/chamber orchestral waves with alternative jazz, spiritual electronica, psychedelic avant-garde, elements of experimental rock, jazzcore, soul and neoclassical trip-hop.
 Conduct your imagination with INOYSON

profiles.name: Trackvogels + CEF ASHANTA
profiles.description:
Trackvogels

Where exhilarating rhythms meet driving guitar riffs, layered with psychedelic synth textures and deep pulsating bass and drums.
They form a family-like unity on stage. Fusing traditional influences from different parts of the globe with an intergalactic touch. Making borders disappear with hypnotising, warm & gritty sounds.…

profiles.name: Cuervo Cuervo
profiles.description:
Cuervo Cuervo is the collaboration between Argentinian musician and charango player Agustin Ganem, and American producer and multi-instrumentalist Benjamin Hill.

After a chance encounter in the streets of Bacalar in 2018, they joined forces to create a unique fusion of psychedelic electronic music blended with Latin American folk music and live improvisation. They are known for their electrifying live performances featuring virtuoso displays of musicianship, tasteful electronics, live looping, and a capacity for improvisation and collaboration. Ganem combines his mastery of South American charango and guitar with live looping, while Hill fuses North American electronic music with the folk influences of lapsteel guitar and classic Latin percussion elements such as caxixi and bongo. No two Cuervo Cuervo live performances are ever alike – each is a unique improvisational dialogue between the two that is created directly on the spot for each audience.

Links:
Website

profiles.name: YEKUMI
profiles.description:
YEKUMI is an Electro-Ethnic duo that creates a complete live performance of electronic music production on the spot, masterfully woven together with live playing of multiple ethnic instruments – didgeridoo, oud, bouzouki, trumpet, flute, handpan, darbuka and ney. They strive to capture the essence of the moment and through melody and rhythm turn it into a dance journey between the sounds.

The live act is a ceremony, in which the creators take the listener on a journey with them, starting at a point where, amidst all the powerful forces of nature, there is something very small and intimate within each of us: a sound, a frequency, in which we move, pure energy that we recognize within ourselves. And with it, embark on a journey of connection to ourselves, into that basic power we have within and with us, and let it lead us into movement – a dance or a smile – towards the realms of mountains, streams, winds, rains, fire, solar & lunar energy, and while letting go, allow the pure energy within to freely guide us.

YEKUMI's heart beat is a deep friendship between two artists, Idan Shahar and Alon Sagi…

profiles.name: Cairê & Friends - Sacred Prayers
profiles.description:
Born in Brazil and rooted in the ancestral wisdom of the Kamanawa people, Cairê weaves a bridge between the Amazon rainforest and the modern world. Renowned as a highlight at festivals throughout Europe, his unique concert-ceremony invites you to dive into a powerful, transformative journey. Through sacred songs and shamanic sounds, Cairê guides us into a deep remembrance of our innate connection to all living things.
 Categories: Live concert, Indigenous Music, Yawanawá, Huni Kuin.

profiles.name: Celine-Dewy, Jayati & Celestial Roots
profiles.description:
Celine-Dewy is a ceremonial dancer, musician, and naturopathic therapist from Amsterdam with Dutch and Indonesian roots. Guided by a deep connection to ritual, music, and nature, she creates spaces where art and healing meet. Through her project Celestial Roots, she weaves together ancestral wisdom, live performance, rhythm, and community, inviting participants into experiences of remembrance, connection, and transformation.
 On Sunday in the Krater, she will present a special Celestial Roots set with her daughter Jayati on the decks, merging rhythm, live percussion, voice, and performance into a vibrant celebration of connection and dance.

profiles.name: Mauricio Lobão with Jungle Tribal Dance Live Set
profiles.description:
Maurício Lobão is a musician and percussionist with over 40 years dedicated to the art of sound. His journey is marked by a deep connection with global rhythms, exploring diverse instruments and musical languages that cross cultures, territories, and states of consciousness.

Throughout his path, Maurício has traveled to many countries, absorbing influences and experiences that enriched his musical expression. His work seamlessly bridges electronic and acoustic music, creating unique soundscapes that converse with both ancestral and contemporary realms.

More than just performance, his music is a lived experience. Inspired by the elements of nature—earth, water, fire, and air—Maurício crafts rhythms that evoke connection, presence, and harmony. His sounds not only entertain but also invite introspection and inner balance.

Recognized for his sensitivity and versatility, he uses percussion as a universal language, capable of uniting people and awakening states of healing and expansion. His art is an invitation to feel, listen, and reconnect with the essence of life through sound.…

profiles.name: Various DJs & Drums · Closing
profiles.description:
Maurício Lobão is a musician and percussionist with over 40 years dedicated to the art of sound. His journey is marked by a deep connection with global rhythms, exploring diverse instruments and musical languages that cross cultures, territories, and states of consciousness.
