Throughout his path, Maurício has traveled to many countries, absorbing influences and experiences that enriched his musical expression. His work seamlessly bridges electronic and acoustic music, creating unique soundscapes that converse with both ancestral and contemporary realms.

More than just performance, his music is a lived experience. Inspired by the elements of nature—earth, water, fire, and air—Maurício crafts rhythms that evoke connection, presence, and harmony. His sounds not only entertain but also invite introspection and inner balance.

Recognized for his sensitivity and versatility, he uses percussion as a universal language, capable of uniting people and awakening states of healing and expansion. His art is an invitation to feel, listen, and reconnect with the essence of life through sound.…

profiles.name: DJ Witte Aap
profiles.description: Not a DJ, but a music selector playing wonderful tunes from all over the world!

profiles.name: The Lyrebirds
profiles.description:
The Lyrebirds is a collective of young professional musicians who play Jazz Manouche.

Jazz Manouche, also known as Gypsy Jazz, is considered the oldest European jazz style. The music originated in the 1930s within the Romani and Sinti communities, where traditional melodies and emerging American swing jazz came together. The style was popularized by Django Reinhardt and is known as Hot Jazz: danceable, rhythmic, and full of improvisation.

The Lyrebirds play this style with their own interpretation and respect. The lineup consists of three gypsy guitars: Lars van Teeffelen, Berend Lantink, and SebaStrings, with Thimo Geijssen & Joris Das on double bass and Lucy Geelen on accordion and piano.

profiles.name: Dansworkshop: Organic movement Dance”
profiles.description:
Classes have the essence of a "laboratory" as we explore different tools and techniques of dance, movement, primal movement, physical theater, and dramatic body expression. We can enter into movement research with understanding of personal cycles (physical, mental, emotional) and universal cycles, through the experience of the continuous present. With a broad palette to investigate diverse movement qualities.
 This laboratory is the conjunction of methodologies such as Dramatic Body Expression (J.Walker), Physical Theater, Butoh, Noguchi Taiso, Contemporary Ballet and 21 years of study, practice and research of organic movement, in which the process of acceptance and expression of everything that emerges is a practice of presence through breathing.
 This journey of techniques and methodologies plus the essence and creativity of each being leads us to favor personal growth through movement and listening. It invites us to make personal growth a daily exercise, as vital as breathing. In this way, transitioning from body awareness to moments of inertia to recover our center, from the ancestral being to the everyday being.…

profiles.name: Arp Frique & Family
profiles.description:
“The Colorful World of Arp Frique” is the exotic and super funky debut album of producer, musician and thinker Arp Frique. After his surprising, very well received debut release on Rush Hour, Arp Frique continues collaborating with Orlando Julius, Ed Motta, Americo Brito, Ronald Snijders and more!
 Pulsating NYC style live disco vibes, interwoven with both Caribbean and Cape Verdean sounds, are themes throughout the record with danceability always guaranteed and a healthy finishing touch of weirdness present across most tracks.
 The first single “Nos Magia” was shortlisted for Track of the Year 2017 at Gilles Peterson’s Worldwide Awards and has been given airplay by BBC Radio 6 Music, BBC Radio 1 and NTS whilst club DJs like Antal and Hunee have all supported his tracks in their sets.
 The name “Arp Frique” refers to the sound of the Arp synths/his love for analog vintage machines and is also a reference to Chic’s ‘Le Freak’, showing love to the genre of disco and deep danceable music from our entire world.…

profiles.name: Self Wellness Practice
profiles.description:
Welcome to Landjuweel.
 You have just arrived and are walking around for the first time; many impressions, crowded, many people.
 How are you doing today? Are you feeling relaxed?
 How do you feel your body today?
 Can you connect with it?...


 Welcome to Landjuweel.
 You have just arrived at the festival and are exploring for the first time; many impressions, crowded, many people.
 How are you doing today? What are you feeling?
 How do you feel your body today?
 Can you connect with it?...

profiles.name: Heart Songs with Ukulele by Immy Angel
profiles.description: Following my Souls calling to share my voice and heart opening songs, guided by the sweet tune of the Ukelele. Happy to share more of my inner world with you! I'm sharing medicine and mantra songs that are about all variations of Divine Love, bringing you back to the essence of your Being. You're very welcome to come sing all together!

profiles.name: Music UPLifting Handpan Experience
profiles.description: In this hour, we experience Handpan Sounds, Spoken Word, Breath & More as a way of reconnecting with ourselves. In this semi-interactive moment Joya is sharing little pieces and bits of how he feels most alive & what keeps him busy. He also wants to bring some interactivity & creating space for vulnerability

profiles.name: Shamballa Tribe
profiles.description: The Shamballa Vision Tribe is a spiritual and flow arts collective that hosts ecstatic singing, cacao ceremonies, and ancestral drumming in and around Netherlands and Belgium and in based in Ghent. They frequently organize urban singing, deep mantra singing and drum circles locally, as well as an annual "Shamballa Vision Festival".

profiles.name: Wim Hof Method Ice Bath
profiles.description:
Immerse yourself in this invigorating ice bath for refreshing relaxation. Perfect for enthusiasts, but also for those with a fear of cold water. To warm the body and prepare our minds, we will perform several rounds of breathing exercises according to the Wim Hof Method. A wonderful experience, as Wim Hof himself says: "Get high on your own supply."

Afterwards, we are ready for the ultimate power boost: the ice bath. Inhale, exhale, surrender to the cold, maintain a sharp mind, and when you step out, you will feel reborn. Afterwards, you can float and dance freely across the festival grounds, feeling refreshed, clear, and full of confidence.

WHM Method Fundamentals Workshop. Duration: 2 hours.

I am Kolja van Zwoll, born and raised in Nieuw & Meer in Amsterdam, and I have been attending Landjuweel since it started :) For the past two years, I have been an instructor for the Wim Hof Method, and I have enjoyed and successfully worked on the healing field for the past two years, and I am very happy that it can do so again this year. To ensure the safety of all participants, I also bring in two trainers and an assistant for the equipment.

profiles.name: Vinyasa yoga and breathwork
profiles.description:
Lindsay is a yoga teacher and facilitator. Her work weaves together yogic, somatic, tantric, and therapeutic practices, creating a space for people to slow down, reconnect with their bodies, and explore their inner world.
 In this class we will do a Vinyasa flow, where you gently flow in one posture to the next, while you connect the movements of your body with your breath.
 Alongside the yoga practice, we will explore calming breathwork and somatic exercises to release tension, awaken the body, and deepen the connection with yourself.

profiles.name: Somatic Playground
profiles.description:
We are Pau and Lois, two women who explore life through the language of the body. Pau does so through Shiatsu and Contact Improvisation, while Lois draws from Holistic Massage and Qigong.

In this workshop, we invite you to reconnect with your body. Join us on a journey of self-awareness to authentic connection through meditation, somatic practices, dance, and touch.
 By slowing down and listening to what is present in the moment, we explore movement as a natural form of expression. Step by step, we open ourselves to the space around us and to one another. Through playful exercises, elements of Contact Improvisation, and respectful touch, we explore themes such as trust, boundaries, listening, giving, and receiving.
 Open to anyone curious about body awareness, movement, and connection. No previous experience is needed.
 Bring a yoga mat or blanket to lie on if you have one (not required).

profiles.name: Estée & Michel
profiles.description:
Michel de Wit (guitar) and Estée Makampo (violin) have been playing together for many years. They create unique, atmospheric, harmonious, and colorful music in the moment. Perfect for relaxing and being inspired. Their music is connecting and is intuitively created in the present moment.

The music is unique and touches the heart and soul.
Estée - Left:
Website
Michel - Left:
Website

profiles.name: Kelsey Kluijtmans concert
profiles.description:
With a raw, heartfelt voice and soulful acoustic sound, she weaves music that invites deep reflection and transformation. Her songs explore the beauty of embracing our shadows and the power of opening the heart, while gently reminding us of life’s impermanence. Awakening gratitude for the present moment.
 The more she delves into sound and resonance, the more she’s amazed by this powerful medicine. We are vibration, everything is vibration and frequency. Kelsey loves to guide people remembering their own soul frequency through the power of music and sound.
 Kelsey writes different types and styles of music, from English, Dutch, mantra to sound journeys. Music that touches the heart.
 Kelsey Kluijtmans: Singer Songwriter - Concerts - Soundhealing - Voice Liberation
 Links:
 Website

profiles.name: Tender Tantric Dance
profiles.description:
Liesbet De Rouck is the founder of The Self Love Academy, a body-oriented facilitator, spoken word artist, and creator of transformative spaces centered around presence, connection, and emotional embodiment.

Her work weaves together movement, music, spoken word, nervous system awareness, intimacy work, and deep human connection. Through modalities such as Tender Moments, Tantric Dance, embodied relational work, meditation, and live performance, she creates spaces where people are invited to soften, feel, and reconnect with themselves beyond performance or survival.

Known for her raw honesty, warmth, and powerful stage presence, Liesbet bridges the worlds of art, healing, and collective transformation. Her performances are both grounding and emotionally evocative, inviting audiences into a deeper experience of aliveness, tenderness, and truth.

She is the founder of The Self Love Academy and facilitates workshops, intensives, and transformational programs throughout the Netherlands.

profiles.name: Walhallala
profiles.description:
A self-healing journey
 There's nothing up there in the 7th heaven!
 From your head to your heart, down to your feet. Connecting with the earth. With every deep breath, you sink deeper into infinity. Your voice resonates and echoes within the AL....
 Shaking, tapping, kneading, bouncing, and sighing. A complete cleansing from top to bottom.
 Final destination: Cosmic Silence

profiles.name: 4-Hands Massage Arnaud Mooij & Marcel Maurik
profiles.description:
Four hands; one experience
A unique collaboration between Marcel and Arnaud
Free, spacious, relaxed, and completely surrendered. That's how you'll feel after a massage from this professional massage duo. Working as one body, they bring your body to a state of complete relaxation, ensuring that your body feels free and open, and it seems like your heart is even fuller and more open, ready to experience the freedom at Ruigoord even more.
When two talents combine their experience and passion, something special emerges. That's what Marcel and Arnaud offer you: a fusion of our strengths as bodyworkers. From our own approach and background, we complement each other in an intuitive and healing collaboration.
You choose what you need. Do you want to feel deeply relaxed, let your energy flow, release blockages, or simply return to yourself? We offer various disciplines that you can freely combine: classic massage, energetic massage, TRAGER® Approach, intuitive bodywork, and Rebalancing techniques. And our hands know exactly where they need to be on your body to give you an amazing experience…

profiles.name: Baba Exotica
profiles.description:
Baba Exotica celebrates the freedom in music, collecting and sharing the weird and wonderful worldwide. His 100% vinyl selections are an unique mix of styles coming from near and far. Get exotic with Highlife & Afro Sounds from Ghana, Gipsy music from Serbia, Psychedelic synth work from Cabo Verde, Peruvian masterpieces or Oriental Farfisa Madness & Rocking Bouzoukis from Greece.
 Tune in, get on board, be free and embrace the worldwide weird and wonderful. Love!
 Links:
 Youtube

profiles.name: Tender Moments
profiles.description:
Liesbet De Rouck is the founder of The Self Love Academy, a body-oriented facilitator, spoken word artist, and creator of transformative spaces centered around presence, connection, and emotional embodiment.

Her work weaves together movement, music, spoken word, nervous system awareness, intimacy work, and deep human connection. Through modalities such as Tender Moments, Tantric Dance, embodied relational work, meditation, and live performance, she creates spaces where people are invited to soften, feel, and reconnect with themselves beyond performance or survival.

Known for her raw honesty, warmth, and powerful stage presence, Liesbet bridges the worlds of art, healing, and collective transformation. Her performances are both grounding and emotionally evocative, inviting audiences into a deeper experience of aliveness, tenderness, and truth.

She is the founder of The Self Love Academy and facilitates workshops, intensives, and transformational programs throughout the Netherlands.

profiles.name: Magdalena Rose Codes
profiles.description:
Magdalene Rose Codes [NL]
 Are you curious about Mary Magdalene?
 Do you feel a longing for the Sacred Feminine?
 Mary Magdalene — the mysterious life partner of Yeshua (the original Hebrew name of Jesus), tantrica, apostle to the apostles, womb priestess, prostitute…?
 A historical figure or a myth?
 Who was — or who is — Mary Magdalene?
 What wisdom does SHE carry?…

The Magdalene Rose Codes offers a re-awakening and activation of the hidden feminine.
 You are warmly welcome to experience her voice, symbolism, scent, and color.
 An encounter with femininity in all its forms. Men are also very welcome.
 We advise against the use of alcohol and other intoxicating substances before and during the Magdalene Rose Codes.

Magdalene Rose Codes [EN]
 Are you curious about Mary Magdalene?
 Do you feel drawn to the Sacred Feminine?
 Mary Magdalene — the mysterious life partner of Yeshua (the original Hebrew name of Jesus), tantrica, apostle to the apostles, womb priestess, prostitute…?
 A historical figure or a myth?
 Who was — or who is — Mary Magdalene?
 What wisdom does SHE carry?…

profiles.name: Landjuweel Temple Space
profiles.description:
Amidst the electric chaos of the festival, a sacred portal awaits. Welcome to Temple Space: a sanctuary designed to pause the buzz and ignite your inner world.

Ready for a journey inward? Embark on a breathtaking journey through your senses and desires, anchored by deep somatic movement and connective practices. This is your playground to claim what you want, honour your boundaries, and speak your truth through authentic, heart-centred communication. Bring your light, your shadow, and everything in between—you are completely welcome here, bound only by the safety and boundaries of those around you. Check in with our Temple Gate Keepers at the threshold to receive the container guidelines before you step inside.

Temple Space is located in the largest yurt on the Natural High grounds. Temple hours: Thursday 21.00-24.00, Friday 20.00-23.00 and Sunday 20.00-23.00.
Landjuweel’s Temple Space is curated by Iskra Bela and inspired by temple arts culture, contemporary dance, ritual-performance practice and ecstatic dance. Invited co-creators this year are Lexmy van den Boogaard and Bee-bee (Bregje).

Lexmy van den Boogaard…

profiles.name: Shamanic Healing Journey
profiles.description:
Peter Moerkens developed this workshop out of his deep desire to help people reconnect with their true selves. As a healer, shaman, and coach, he creates a warm, safe space where participants can relax, feel, and open themselves to the unknown. His work combines shamanistic rituals, trance journeys, sound healing, and Reconnective Healing into a powerful inner journey. What drives him is seeing people experience more peace, space, light, and connection after the workshop – as if something ancient can be soothed and something essential within them can be awakened again. Peter has received initiations from Qúero Priest and Shaman Nicolas Pauccar Calcina II as Earth Keeper, and he is initiated into the lineage of Qúero Shamans from the high mountains of Cusco, Peru.

Shamanic Healing Journey:
“Come completely relax, sinking into your body and maximizing connection with your heart and soul through the healing light frequencies during this Shamanic Trance Journey with (sound)healing.”
During this workshop, you will be welcomed into a field of healing light frequencies and love. You achieve coherence between your heart and your brain, allowing you to relax deeply in your body…

profiles.name: Sound Journey with Rinco & Stéphanie from Wij Zijn Bloei (We Are Blooming)
profiles.description:
Treat yourself to a moment of peace and allow yourself to embark on an inner journey of sound, silence, and deep relaxation. During this special Sound Journey, Rinco & Stéphanie will guide you into the healing world of handpan, singing bowls, gong, and guided meditation.

In the peaceful energy of the Landjuweel Festival, we will create a gentle space where you can simply be. A place to land, let go, and return to yourself. As the warm sounds surround you, you can relax and feel the vibrations moving through your body, inviting every cell to rest.
 Stéphanie guides the journey with her voice, meditation, handpan, and singing bowls. Her gentle presence invites you to delve deeper into your body and create space for relaxation and connection. Rinco complements this journey with the deep, grounding resonance of the gong. Together, they weave a bed of peace, stillness, and groundedness.
 The sounds will take you to another state of being, where you can recharge, relax, and return to yourself. Afterwards, you'll return to the festival, feeling grounded, clear, and full of new energy.
 Come lie down. Breathe out. Receive.
 Sound and silence…

profiles.name: Mantra & Cacao
profiles.description:
Mirthe invites you to write down a word, phrase, or intention. She will then sing and chant these texts live, accompanied by her cobalt blue harmonium.

This creates shared mantras and moments where personal words become audible in music.

Since returning from Tiru, India, Mirthe has been exploring art forms that center around voice and devotional singing. Mirthe is an artist and performer.

profiles.name: Open Your Heart' Ademreis
profiles.description:
Piroska & Alina guide participants through deep breathing and mindfulness experiences that emphasize gentleness, connection, and a sense of homecoming.

By combining connected breathing, music, mindfulness, and subtle shamanistic elements, they create a safe and warm space where participants can slow down, feel, and reconnect with their hearts.
During their "Open Your Heart" session, they guide participants on a gentle breathing journey that helps to release tension, give emotions space, and rediscover the natural ability of the heart to connect. Their guidance is characterized by presence, intuition, and a deep commitment to personal growth and inner well-being.
Together, they create a place where people can escape from the hustle and bustle, find stillness in their breath, and feel connected to themselves and those around them.
No prior experience with breathing exercises is necessary; everyone is welcome.

profiles.name: Shamanic Breath
profiles.description:
Shamanic Breathing is a powerful technique that initiates a psycho-spiritual transformation process. The Breath connects you with the pure consciousness of the element Air. It flows through you, like a touch that awakens you. Everything that moves within you comes to life, beyond everyday awareness and ego. The Breath as a portal through which you travel to remember your true self and origin, in the gentle yet powerful field of Shamanic practice.

Spaceholders:
 Gaby Moon Crow
 Lisette de Jong
 Linda Nummerdor

profiles.name: Healing Massage Workshop
profiles.description:
Sanne Croese is a facilitator, trainer, and founder of Body & Soul by Sanne. She works with individuals, couples, and groups in the fields of embodiment, intimacy, healing, and personal growth. Her work combines breathwork, bodywork, elements of tantra, conscious kink, Erotic Blueprints, guided trance journeys, energy work, and bodywork. She facilitates workshops for couples, Healing Breathwork circles, bodyworker immersion days and trainings, and transformational events such as the Goddess Play event.

On Sunday, she will lead the Healing Massage Workshop, an experiential journey into the art of conscious and healing touch. This workshop is based on the belief that everyone has the ability to bring healing through their hands. Through intention, presence, awareness, energy, and touch, participants will explore how a simple massage can become a deeply nourishing and transformative experience. You will learn practical techniques while discovering the importance of attunement, listening, and working with energy. Open to all levels, this workshop invites you to reconnect with the healing power that already lives within you. You can come alone or with a partner.

profiles.name: Touch Me
profiles.description: Warmth, care and trust grow in small moments of real connection. A hand on a shoulder. A slow hug. A foot massage. These small acts of conscious touch are a superpower. In this workshop by Touch Me, we explore the topic of touch and put it into action. You are welcome as a couple, as friends, or on your own. Together, we create a world with more love and presence, one conscious touch at a time.

profiles.name: SoulSong Activation – The Healing Power of Light Language
profiles.description:
In this experiential workshop, you will discover the healing power of Light Language, sound, and frequency. Through live sound transmissions, a guided meditation, and direct experience, you will learn how energetic codes and vibrations can contribute to awareness, connection, and inner transformation.

A gentle yet powerful introduction to SoulSong Activation, where voice, consciousness, and frequency come together as a path to connection, healing, and remembering your own essence. No prior experience is necessary; only an open heart and curiosity are required.

Azuni Raphael is a sound healer, voice activator, and space holder. By opening her own voice, she discovered a deeper layer of her soul's purpose: sharing healing frequencies through sound and Light Language.

With her voice and presence, she creates a supportive field in which people can experience the power of frequency, consciousness, and inner connection. Her work invites us to remember the wisdom that is already present within each of us…

profiles.name: Somatic Healing Workshop: Raindrop Movement™
profiles.description:
Raindrop Movement™ is a gentle yet profoundly transformative somatic healing modality that invites us to return home to the wisdom of the body. Rooted in neuroscience, nervous system regulation, trauma-informed practice, breath, and intuitive movement, it offers a pathway beyond thinking and into direct embodied experience.
 Rather than trying to fix, force, or overcome ourselves, Raindrop Movement teaches us to slow down, listen deeply, and follow the body's innate intelligence. As we soften habitual patterns of tension, protection, and disconnection, the nervous system begins to regulate naturally, allowing greater ease, emotional resilience, vitality, and authentic expression to emerge.
 Every movement becomes an opportunity to reconnect with ourselves—not through performance, but through presence. In this space, healing is not something we achieve, but something we allow.
 Whether you are seeking stress relief, emotional release, deeper self-awareness, or a more intimate connection with your body, Raindrop Movement offers an invitation to experience the transformative power of somatic healing from the inside out.
 Our facilitators:…

profiles.name: DIY Ecstatic Bodywork —release & activation
profiles.description:
Robbert van Ede creates spaces where the body's natural flow can be released. As a transformative bodyworker, he helps you remember what it feels like to be completely present, free, and at peace.

With a deep trust in the wisdom of the nervous system, Robbert brings a grounded, loving, and soulful energy to the festival—ready to co-create a space where life force energy can fully express itself.

profiles.name: Improvisation Theatre
profiles.description:
When was the last time you almost peed yourself laughing? If you join this workshop, tomorrow you can say: yesterday! And the best part? You don't even have to be funny yourself.
 Through accessible collaborative games you'll create, move and discover what happens when you stop overthinking. Playing without brakes, saying yes, celebrating mistakes.
 The games have their roots in improvisational theatre, but you don't have to be an actor, or ever want to become one.
 No experience needed. No script. No wrong answers.
 Laughter guaranteed.


 Wanneer heb jij voor het laatst bijna in je broek geplast van het lachen? Als je deze workshop volgt kan je morgen zeggen: gisteren! En het beste deel? Je hoeft zelf niet eens grappig te zijn.
 Via toegankelijke samenwerkingsspellen ga je samen creëren, bewegen en ontdekken wat er gebeurt als je stopt met nadenken. Spelen zonder rem, ja zeggen, fouten vieren.
 De spellen hebben hun wortels in het improvisatietheater, maar je hoeft geen acteur te zijn, of te willen worden.
 Geen ervaring nodig. Geen script. Geen foute antwoorden.
 Lachen gegarandeerd.

profiles.name: Gong Meditatie
profiles.description: Mark Bakker, also known as "The Gong Guide of Amsterdam," offers sound journeys using gongs and singing bowls. He combines 30 years of experience as a drummer with a background in psychology. After several training sessions in the United States, Portugal, and the Netherlands, he began offering gong sessions himself two years ago. In his sessions, he takes you on a sonic journey through his musicality, where all you need to do is listen; the magical sounds of these instruments will transport you to deep relaxation. A sound massage for body and mind, in which you can completely relax, and perhaps even gain new insights.

profiles.name: Kundalini Ceremony
profiles.description:
This Kundalini Ceremony is a deep and powerful experience, inviting you on a journey inward. Where you are guided to expand your consciousness, elevate your energetic frequency, and deepen the connection between earth, body, heart, and spirit.

Throughout the ceremony, participants are comfortably lying on yoga mats, allowing the body to fully relax and receive.
 The space is held with presence, care, and unconditional love, allowing you to feel safe enough to soften, let go, and surrender to your experience. In this nurturing environment, you are invited to trust the wisdom of your body and the intelligence of your own energy.

As the energy begins to move, you may experience spontaneous movements, physical sensations, emotional releases, visions, insights, feelings of bliss, or moments of profound stillness. Every expression is welcome. There is nothing to force, nothing to control, and nothing to achieve. The invitation is simply to be fully present with whatever arises, moment by moment.

Each journey is unique and deeply personal. The energy meets you exactly where you are, offering what is most aligned with your highest good in that moment.…

profiles.name: Breathwork ~ Strengthening the Subtle Body
profiles.description:
Samir Kanji facilitates trauma-focused breathing exercises.

His work is based on the understanding that difficult life experiences can continue to shape how we relate to ourselves, others, and the world long after the events themselves have passed. These adaptations may manifest as recurring patterns, chronic stress, emotional overwhelm, disconnection, or a sense of being stuck.
Through breathing exercises, Samir supports people in working with and integrating these experiences while also strengthening internal resources such as resilience, self-trust, presence, courage, connection, playfulness, and joy. Rather than focusing only on what is difficult, his approach also cultivates the capacities that help people meet life more fully.
Born in Pakistan to an African family with Indian ancestry, raised Canadian, and now living in the Netherlands, Samir brings a cross-cultural perspective to his work. His practice is informed by a two-year, 1,000-hour training in trauma-focused breathing exercises and grounded in an anti-oppressive framework that resists colonialism, patriarchy, capitalism, and white supremacy.

profiles.name: Contact with Movement
profiles.description:
Joya Aniel is on a mission to bring out the best of Humanity. By going through layers of (inherited) Shame, Loneliness, Sadness & (Social) Fear, he connects deeper with Our Essence. He uses tools such as Breathwork, Handpan, Massage & Dance to fulfill his mission.

It is Joya Aniel's wish to Create a world where everyone/everything is Welcome & Where we can Play, Explore & Expand on (this Heaven as) Earth.

In this Explorative Moment we Experience how two bodies become One, and then two again. We will sink in to our bodies & the bodies of others. With Meditative Movement & Touch we Slow Down, Feel & Connect. We welcome all emotions like Shame, Nervousness & Fear AND emotions like Harmony, Peace & Joy. Come as you Are, Enjoy this little Journey

profiles.name: Women's Circle · The Voice of Your Female Ancestors
profiles.description:
For centuries, family trees were passed down through men, and women disappeared from history. In this women's circle, we reflect on our female lineage: the chain of women who made us possible.

With a short guided visualization, you connect with your ancestral female line. What do you want to see? Together, we honor their existence and their contribution to the woman you are today through a shared ritual.
A powerful and connecting session about ancestry, identity, and female strength, even if you know little about your family history.

Fien Lindelauff
Fien Lindelauff is the founder of Moederstamboom (Mother's Genealogy) and specializes in researching women's lineages. In addition, she is a tantra yoga teacher and organizes women's circles, ceremonies, and retreats.

profiles.name: In the Heart
profiles.description:
In this workshop, you will connect with your heart and the hearts of others, within the magical unity field that we create through visualization, bodywork, and role-playing.

Whether your heart is trembling with fear of being seen, closed off, confused, or joyfully leaping towards everyone, it says nothing about whether you can receive love. The universal love from which we essentially exist and are connected embraces every state of being. And precisely where we dare to meet ourselves and each other in the place of truth, love has a chance to flow. Love for our vulnerable and our fearful hearts. This afternoon, we will bring our hearts home through gentle, careful, systemic, shamanistic, and tantric exploration.

Welcome to all the shocked, brave, and curious hearts!
Manja Gruson
About the workshop facilitator Manja Gruson: "For twelve years, I have run a healing practice in which I use my own developed methods to quickly reach the core, make connections, and carefully invite and guide my clients towards self-understanding and self-love through awareness of their protective patterns.…"

profiles.name: State of Being
profiles.description:
My name is Mer, and my journey from a restless and chaotic mind to one of deep observation and peace has transformed not only my life but also how I teach. Through conscious breathing, meditation, and mindful movement, I’ve come to understand the profound connection between mind and body. In my classes, I guide you to explore your own breath and body awareness, helping you remain present and grounded.
 Restless, chaotic, nervous—these were some of the adjectives that used to describe my mind and character. After years immersed in meditation, I have witnessed how these traits transformed into an observer, meticulous, and creative. The simple act of learning to observe my mind, understanding how it connects with my body, and disidentifying from both has granted me an inner peace bathed in acceptance, compassion, and LOVE for myself.
 Motivated by these experiences, I decided to training as a Mayeutik Coach (Kuestiona), Holistic Therapist specializing in conscious breathing therapy (Yogalap) and in Non-conscious mind. On the side other courses completed my tools as a therapist: Vipassana, Bodywork and Reiki.…

profiles.name: Drugs Zonder Drugs
profiles.description:
No need for any special tools or equipment. Achieve a state of flow through creativity. Through play, movement, and imagination, Vita and Thirza invite you to reconnect with your inner child and embrace that freedom. A moment away from the everyday, back to the heart. To the place where anything is possible.

Vita is a visual artist, and Thirza is a dancer and choreographer. Together, they create a unique combination that brings together energy, color, and movement in a workshop that inspires, touches, and connects.

profiles.name: Embodied Dating Club
profiles.description:
Dating apps are overrated. Let's meet each other in real life. A fun workshop for singles who want to open the festival together. We step out of our heads, into our bodies, and create space for curiosity, attraction, and flirting. With guided exercises, you'll meet different people, feel what happens, and practice staying true to yourself while making contact. No speed dating or pressure to find someone. Instead, a warm, light, and exciting place to awaken your playfulness and bring it into the festival experience. Maybe you'll find attraction. Maybe a new festival friend. Or maybe you'll meet someone on the dance floor later who suddenly doesn't seem so strange anymore. Connect with your body, not just your bio.
 Denise Kooij
 Denise Kooij is a somatic intimacy coach and embodiment facilitator, working with men, singles, and mixed groups. Her spaces bring depth and playfulness together. Where truth is welcome, emotions are allowed, and the body guides the way. She helps people to step out of their heads and into the felt experience of life and love.…

profiles.name: Rasta Robert & Friends
profiles.description: Dreamtime Healing sound massage concerts, mantra singing, theremin, spontaneous musical improvisation, spiritual chill-out space. Every day 2:00 PM - 10:00 PM, concert sessions 2:00 PM - 3:30 PM and 8:00 PM - 9:30 PM (check-in 30 minutes prior).

profiles.name: Heart Chakra Meditation
profiles.description:
The Heart Chakra Meditation (as designed by Karunesh) is a one-hour active meditation designed to open, cleanse, and balance the heart energy center (Anahata). It's an active meditation that uses movement rather than sitting still, making it accessible to people who find traditional meditation difficult.
 The technique consists of specific movements, music, and breathing exercises rooted in Sufi traditions. Tension is released, and self-love and compassion are fostered, culminating in deep relaxation.
 Clear explanations will be provided before the meditation, and afterwards there will be time for questions and sharing your experiences.
 Marcel “Mizza” Hendriks lives and works at the Wajid OSHO Meditation Centre in The Hague, where he offers meditation guidance, among other things. Mizza can guide you to a state of pure consciousness in a short time using simple and understandable instructions.

profiles.name: Northern Roots – body, nature & connection
profiles.description:
This workshop is for you if you feel a connection to nature, your body, or your roots – but also a sense of disconnection, silence, or something that was never passed on.

In many northern cultures, including Sámi traditions, the core wasn't a single ritual, but a relationship with the land, the body, and rhythm. In this workshop, we don’t try to reconstruct lost traditions, but instead create space where your own connection can begin to re-emerge.
 We work with breath, body, sound, and natural elements – listening to the nervous system and building a sense of safety. Inspiration may come from practices like Joiku, not as performance, but as a natural extension of the breath.

In the workshop, we will: arrive into the body and regulate the nervous system
 practice guided breathing (rhythm + longer exhales)
 use gentle movement and grounding (earth/contact)
 explore sound as an extension of the breath
 spend time in quiet presence

No prior experience is needed – you participate from your own boundaries.

profiles.name: Live from your inner wisdom.
profiles.description:
Esther Simao helps people rediscover the wisdom that already exists within them. From her practice, es Imago, she works with awareness development, body-oriented work, and shifting deeply ingrained patterns in our lives. Her knowledge and experience are based on ancient wisdom traditions that help people to reconnect with themselves, nature, and their inner knowing.

In the workshop "Live Your Inner Wisdom," Esther shares insights from the Paleolithic shamanistic tradition. After a brief introduction to this ancient knowledge, participants are invited to explore it for themselves. Through practical exercises, they can have a direct encounter with their inner knowing, which goes beyond thinking. This is an experience of listening, feeling, and remembering what is already known deep within.

This workshop is an invitation to pause, connect with your own source of wisdom, and discover how it can support you in everyday life. By combining depth, simplicity, and experience, Esther creates a safe space where participants can meet their own answers.
 Live from your inner wisdom ~ Esther Simao…

profiles.name: Yin Yoga & Reiki with DjezzeManon
profiles.description:
DjezzManon is a writer and facilitator, and the creator of Zachte Aarde (Soft Earth).

Through yin yoga, kundalini, Reiki, and body awareness practices, she creates sessions where slowing down, feeling, and connection are central. Her guidance is warm, accessible, and intuitive, with space for softness, playfulness, and anything that arises during the session.

Session
During this Yin & Reiki session, you are invited to slow down, feel, and deepen your connection to your body. Through gentle yin poses, you create space to release tension and experience greater presence within yourself.

During the session, DjezzManon intuitively uses Reiki: a gentle form of energetic work where life energy can flow through touch or presence. By connecting with the larger field (whatever you may call it), you create space for relaxation, softening, and inner movement.

Reiki is always applied with consent and tailored to what feels good for you.

This session invites you to step away from your thoughts, take deeper breaths, and reconnect with what you feel within yourself. A gentle, grounding experience where you don't need to solve anything, but can simply return to yourself.

profiles.name: Conscious Flirting & Heart-Led Desire
profiles.description:
Sandi Djoulfian is a facilitator, feminine embodied coach, and founder of Medicine Within. Her work weaves together embodied tantra, temple arts, feminine archetypal & elemental wisdom, shamanism, nervous system awareness, and transformational group experiences that invite people into deeper intimacy with themselves, others, and Spirit.
 Drawing from years of experience facilitating women’s circles, temple nights, retreats, kambô ceremonies, and embodiment workshops, Sandi creates spaces where authenticity, connection, and personal transformation can unfold naturally. Her approach blends ancient wisdom with grounded embodiment, supporting people to reconnect with their vitality, truth, and innate radiance.
 Based in Amsterdam and teaching internationally, she is passionate about cultivating community, conscious relationships, feminine leadership, and embodied living.

profiles.name: Chakra journey
profiles.description:
The Chakra Journey is a transformative movement and dance experience that invites you to explore and awaken the seven energy centers of the body. Guided throughout the journey, participants are blindfolded, allowing attention to move away from the outside world and toward the wisdom of the body, intuition, and inner experience. You are invited to connect with the unique qualities and energies of each chakra in a deeply personal and authentic way.
 Through a combination of movement, dance, breathwork, sound, expression, and meditation, we travel through each of the seven chakras, awakening and exploring the unique qualities, emotions, and energies associated with each energy center. As we move through the body in this way, layers of tension, stagnation, and stored emotions can begin to soften and release, creating more space for vitality, flow, and self-expression.…

profiles.name: Love Yourself' workshop
profiles.description:
In this workshop, we turn inward and create a safe space to open our hearts. With gentleness and without judgment, we meet ourselves exactly as we are. We connect with all aspects of ourselves, both the light and the dark, and allow what needs to be seen and felt to emerge.

Through Yin yoga, breathing exercises, meditation, and visualization, we deepen our connection with ourselves. From this inner connection, compassion grows: first for ourselves, and naturally extends outwards to the world around us. A loving journey inward, in which you are invited to fully embrace yourself.

Lieke works as a Yin yoga teacher, systemic coach, and trainer. With warmth, love, and connection, she guides individuals and groups in discovering their true potential.

profiles.name: Vallei Orgasme
profiles.description:
For those who already have a ticket for the Landjuweel festival, we warmly invite you to this interactive workshop.

After an "I-power" meditation, we will discuss what "Valley" means in your life, answer questions, explain the stages of sexual development, and facilitate interaction among participants.

There may still be space for Chi Kung practice. We will conclude with a session on calming inner peace.

The tipi tent has limited capacity, so if it's full, it's full.

profiles.name: Shake The Dust
profiles.description:
LilyKa (Lieneke) and Karain (Ayşegül Ivy) combine live instruments, breathwork, voice, electronics, and improvisation, inviting people on journeys of presence and transformation.

Lieneke is a musician and facilitator for breathwork and Shake the Dust.
Ayşegül Ivy is a pianist, electronic musician, and producer.

For this edition of Landjuweel, we are bringing a special Shake the Dust journey accompanied by a hybrid DJ set with live instruments.

Shake the Dust is a transformative practice that engages the body, heart, and mind. You are invited to release what no longer serves you and to reconnect with your body through music.
Guided by a poetic theme, we will move together through waves of shaking, jumping, resting, dancing, intuitive flow, plus elements of yoga, somatics, and bodyweight strength work.

profiles.name: Tantric Shibari Workshop: how to play with Ropes
profiles.description:
Kim & Kyara will take you on a journey into their world of Conscious Kink and Sensual Play. We bring together two worlds that we already know well: tantra and kink. Tantra = consciously experiencing what is within you and connecting with the energy of another in a mature way. Being vulnerable and taking emotions seriously. Heart (feeling) above head (reason).

Shibari = Japanese knot art, or erotic bondage. Originating from the kink world, it has become increasingly popular... You can encounter shibari in many forms, from sadistic to cuddling knots: rope is incredibly diverse, so we introduce our favorite form:: tantric knots.
How can you play with rope in a pleasant and conscious way without it being too complicated or erotic? How do you even get started with shibari?

We will show you some demonstrations of what a shibari game looks like, and we will practice together where you can get to know the diversity of rope and play. The workshop is non-sexual/clothing remains on, and consent is sacred: if something doesn't feel good, you are welcome to look / step out of the exercise and rejoin later.

About us…

profiles.name: The Art of Seduction: A tribute to being a woman
profiles.description:
The focus is not on seducing others. It's about coming home to yourself. About fully embracing your body, strength, beauty, and feminine energy.

In this playful, sensual, and safe workshop, we will explore where your erotic life force flows through you using bodywork, theater exercises, and mindfulness practices. Not from performance or obligation, but from pleasure, presence, and self-love.
We will unravel the myth that seduction is something you "do". Instead, you'll discover how irresistible you become when you truly allow yourself to feel, embody, and enjoy yourself.

Sexuality is just one aspect of Eros. Eros also encompasses love, beauty, vitality, and desire. Where does your natural magnetism lie? What do you yearn for more softness, freedom, or self-love?

In my opinion, a woman who can naturally enjoy herself is inherently sensual. A woman who welcomes and loves her body radiates a deep attraction. We will explore how to connect with this together during this unique workshop...

profiles.name: FreeFlow Flashmob
profiles.description: Somewhere, sometime, this week. Maybe tomorrow morning after breakfast, maybe when the sun sets over the church, maybe when you've just tied your shoelaces. The FreeFlow Flashmob passes by. Or rather: it comes towards you. A rave on wheels, a party that creates itself, a dance that invites you to join in. With DJs on the bike sound system and live music. No stage, no audience, just participants who don't yet know they're part of it. Dancing, contact improvisation, and homo ludens on two wheels. The party creates itself, and you participate. Afterwards, we dissolve into the wind, as if nothing had happened, except in your legs. Those who were there will know. The rest will hear the stories.

profiles.name: Bakfietsband
profiles.description:
The cargo bike band embodies joyful activism at its finest. This mobile stage brings a smile to your face and transforms the street into a dance floor. Come join us for some fun or participate with this cheerful group.

The cargo bike band plays 3 times a day, in the afternoon, evening, and night. There is also a daily guest performance, with a group from South America, AP Mayor, performing on Saturday.

profiles.name: Divine Mistress of Craziness
profiles.description: (Born in 1939) She commutes between Cologne and the Amsterdam artist village of Ruigoord. After taking a parachute jump on her 60th birthday, she left behind her conventional life to pursue profound spiritual experiences. In her temple in Ruigoord, she celebrates encounters at a soul level and opens doors to higher levels of consciousness. More information about her unique philosophy can be found on the Ruigoord Artist Page.

profiles.name: The Word, hosted by Yvonne van Doorn and Diana Ozon
profiles.description:
YVONNE VAN DOORN & DIANA OZON

Yvonne van Doorn-Mousset has been active in the Dutch avant-garde since the 1960s. She presented the radio program "Uitlaat" by Wim de Bie, was the partner and business advisor to writer and performer Johnny van Doorn, and is a board member of the performance poetry prize "De Johnny."

For over 24 years, she has organized and presented "The Word en Vurige Tongen" in Ruigoord. She did this together with poet Hans Plomp, who encouraged her to continue this work.
Since autumn 2024, Yvonne has formed a duo with punk poet Diana Ozon. Since the 1980s, Diana has been one of the most prominent female voices within Dutch performance and underground poetry. With her uncompromising performances, in which poetry, music, and activism converge, she paved the way for generations of poets and performers. Her work embodies freedom, social engagement, and artistic independence.

Yvonne (2011) and Diana (2005) have both received the Ruigoord Trophy. Together with "The Word en Vurige Tongen," they keep the traditions of poetry, performance, and free expression alive.

profiles.name: Hidden Bamboo Garden
profiles.description:
HIDDEN BAMBOO GARDEN
 A lush, groovy, multidimensional garden hangout sprinkled with the deliciousness of our new signature cocktail, which is both sparkly and supersensory.
 VR experience at Hidden Bamboo Garden
 Nemo Vos presents Digital Darkroom
 A holistic session in VR where spirituality and exact science come together.
 Where you move between the present, the future, and the past.
 Where an inner breakthrough and shameless consumption can go through one door.
 Where the digital and analog 
 The microscopic and the enormous 
 The seed cell and the egg 
 The mundane and endlessly complex 
 Come together in embrace, so that we can all sigh with relief.
 It's finally really summer.

 Left:
 Website

profiles.name: The Bard’s Horn
profiles.description:
Thursday:
 21.00 till 01.00 DJs Archangel, Graham B, JP and Ambient Daan
 Friday:
 16.00 to 20.00 with storytellers Simone Engeln, Daan P., Belinda with musical accompaniment by Fons, musical interlude by sitar player Dougal
 20.00 to 21.00 Monty Pagan, a delightful Amsterdam folk rock band
 21.00 till 01.00 DJs Archangel, Graham B, JP and Ambient Daan
 Saturday:
 16.00 to 20.00 with storytellers Simone Engeln, Daan P., Belinda with musical accompaniment by Fons, musical interlude by sitar player Dougal
 20.00 to 21.00 Monty Pagan, a delightful Amsterdam folk rock band
 21.00 till late DJs Archangel, Graham B, JP and Ambient Daan
 Sunday:
 15.00 to 18.00 ParaNoya and friends with poetry and art
 Simone Engeln (formerly known as Simone Angel) is a versatile storyteller whose life itself is a story. After spending twenty years in the jungle of Belize, she returned to the Netherlands in 2023. Her adventurous life began at the age of 18; under the international spotlight of television…

profiles.name: Silk Fans workshop - hosted by Tara Moon
profiles.description: Whether you’re new to fan flow or a seasoned practicer, this workshop will have something for you! We will explore expansive foundational moves as well as a little trippy tech work, truly showcasing the range of movement and play that silk fan has to offer.

profiles.name: Poi workshop by Hidde (Hidden Flow)
profiles.description: Step into the magical world of poi, where two simple cords transform into mesmerizing circles of rhythm, movement, and flow. Join Hidde for a playful beginner-friendly workshop and discover that anyone can learn this beautiful flow art: no experience needed, just curiosity. Come as you are, lose yourself in the dance of the circles, and leave with a little more flow than you arrived with!

profiles.name: Hoop Workshop by Iris Dam Hoops
profiles.description: You can do a lot more with a hulahoop than hoop it around your waist. In this workshop you will learn some hooptricks, and tie them together in a little sequence. Come discover how to dance and flow with a hoop, fun guaranteed! Suitable for all levels.

profiles.name: Contact Staff Workshop hosted by The Fire Messiah
profiles.description: Contact staff is a beautiful tool for movement expression and connection with your own body. Join Tiago (The Fire Messiah) in this workshop where you will explore flowing with the contact staff and how this relationship can increase your awareness of your own body. We will finish the workshop with some fun games :).

profiles.name: Spin Fans workshop hosted by Tara Moon
FlowerSticks Workshop hosted by Rene FocusFire
profiles.description: In this Flowersticks workshop you will amaze yourself with skills that you never knew you have, and tricks anyone can learn with just 3 sticks. Discover the many possibilities and ways of playing with this versatile prop, all while you are having fun playing!

profiles.name: DragonStaff workshop by Sem
profiles.description: Ready for your first steps to bend fire in your own future and guide your own light? Come play with us and find out if your flow journey start here.

profiles.name: Introduction to Club Juggling by Nakarit and Nico
profiles.description: The goal is to explore your body through various positions to build muscle memory—identifying movement types—and to connect with an external object. It is open to all skill levels, allowing us to explore together how to achieve fluid juggling.

profiles.name: Poppenkastvoorstelling
profiles.description: During the "Landjuweel" (a Dutch festival), puppet shows will be performed at Ruigoord 16. The start times will be announced on a sign outside. The afternoon performances are suitable for all ages.

profiles.name: Poi workshop by Bartoz (Bzarr)
profiles.description: Step into the magical world of poi, where two simple cords transform into mesmerizing circles of rhythm, movement, and flow. Join Bartoz for a playful beginner-friendly workshop and discover that anyone can learn this beautiful flow art: no experience needed, just curiosity. Come as you are, lose yourself in the dance of the circles and leave with a little more flow than you arrived with!

profiles.name: Dapo Star Workshop by The Fire Messiah
profiles.description: The Dapo Star has been taking over the world and dancefloors for years, and this year it makes its way to Landjuweel. Tiago (The Fire Messiah) will be teaching you how to use this wonderful tool of expression, and he is sure you will become addicted after this workshop. We will finish the workshop with some fun interactive games. More than 20 Dapo's are available for borrowing in this workshop, so plenty of space for those who don't have a Dapo!

profiles.name: Double staff Workshop by Bartoz (Bzarr)
profiles.description: Two sticks. Four ends. Infinite ways to look ridiculous before you look amazing. This double staff workshop is where we stop being precious about “getting it right” and start playing. We’ll chase spins, launch throws (and drop them, proudly), untangle isolations, and flirt with contact until the staffs start feeling like extensions of your arms instead of things trying to escape them. Come find out what these things can actually do. No experience needed, just a willingness to flail with intention.

profiles.name: Earth Garden
profiles.description:
Amidst the performances, music and encounters, the Earth Garden offers a place to listen, connect to the earth, create and simply be.
 The Earth Garden Crew invites you to become more than a visitor. Spend time with the earth, create a gift from and/or for the earth with your hands, enjoy a nourishing açaí bowl and a cup of homemade blue Clitoria tea, and be carried by live music throughout the morning,...
 Thursday | 22:00 – 00:00
 *The Absinth Bar*
 Tableau Vivant & Live Performance
 Step into a surreal world where myth, ritual and imagination meet. Join us for an intimate late-night experience in the Earth Garden.
 Friday, Saturday & Sunday | 12:00 – 15:00
 Throughout the morning, accompanied by live music, you are invited to join:
 * *The Collective Clayground* – An artwork, shaped by everyone who joins. No ownership, only one piece growing in the hands of many. Connect with the earth, with each other and with your self..
 * *Gift Shop – *What Is Your Gift?** – This is not a place to buy clothes, but to exchange gifts. Find a unique festival piece and offer something in return—not money, but a talent, a kind gesture, your time or a skill.…

profiles.name: La Prudon × Ibu Ibiza · Hats & Fashion Show
profiles.description:
Two designers, two crafts, one show. La Prudon (Christine Prudon) creates handmade hats as wearable art – small works of art that also happen to fit on a head. Ibu Ibiza (Su-an Dijckmeester, Ibiza) makes sustainable clothing. During Landjuweel, they will present an exclusive pop-up hat and fashion show on the Ruigoord grounds together.

Shows

Friday, July 24th, 17:00
Sunday, July 26th, 19:00

Location: De straat bij de Dingplaats, Ruigoord
Left:
Instagram La Prudon

profiles.name: Flamingo hitmix
profiles.description:
This three-bird oscillation orchestra is far more than your average cover band, yet fits on a street corner. They perform 90s classics live, with a sugar coated beat. You might feel ecstatic, rejoiced, or even touched by long-forgotten or freshly recalled dance-upon tunes.
 At the heart of the show: vocalist Aliesje, a multi-decadal dance music chameleon. She is energetically supported by Joris and Martinus on synths and sounds. Straight from Flamingo street Amsterdam Noord, Flamingo Hitmix traverses the past and present of floor-filling club-classics.

profiles.name: Garden of Devotion
profiles.description:
During Landjuweel, Garden of Devotion opens its doors as an intimate barefoot garden where nature, art, music, taste, scent and stillness come together: a haven of peace, beauty and love, a place for inspiration, reflection, connection and surrender.

Take off your shoes, enter softly and let yourself be carried away by live music, soundscapes, performance and rituals.
 Shoes off. Senses on.
 Garden Ruigoord 1 open on Saturdays and Sundays between 2:00 PM and 6:00 PM.

profiles.name: GUILTY-PLEASURE WOMEN…
profiles.description:
La Prudon & Annie Jan behind the decks, playing the cheesiest hits, guilty pleasures, and deliciously catchy sing-alongs.

The Bard's Horn
Thursday | 8:00 PM – 10:00 PM
Seriously awesome stuff. No shame.
So get moving, darling... see you on the dancefloor!

profiles.name: Ruigoord Rebels
profiles.description:
Sweltering Louisiana blues, soul and funk from the 70s, controversial swing from the vibrant 30s and 40s. Ruigoord Rebels, a band firmly rooted in the renowned cultural hub, has reinvented itself with this 6-man (well, two women and four men) formation.

The band has undergone many transformations around Barbara Schroevers, the heart of the rebels. She accompanies her characteristic vocals with her dobro mandolin and takes you on a journey through life-filled songs.
Barbara is supported by Alain Eskinasi on keyboard, Simon Haneveld on guitar, Lili Bell on harmonica, Walking Walter on bass, and Hans van Brunschot on drums.

profiles.name: Spull
profiles.description:
Spull is a 9-piece international ensemble from Amsterdam, known for its instrumental funk-fueled soul and uplifting afro-jazz.
 With a lineup featuring three horns, two percussionists, drums, bass, keys, and guitar, Spull brings a high-energy live show packed with hip-moving grooves, raving horn melodies, and a spicy touch of cinematic filth.
 Kicking off their journey in Amsterdam’s club circuit (Cinetol, OCCII, De Nieuwe Anita), Spull quickly gained momentum, hitting stages like the Breda Jazz Festival, the Jazz Festival Delft, the Over de Top Festival and with international dates now on the horizon.


 Spull is a band from Amsterdam with international roots, that combines styles such as Funk, Soul and Afro-jazz into a swinging groove explosion.
 The nine-piece formation, consisting of three brass instruments, two percussionists, drums, keys, bass and guitar, always ensures an overwhelming show full of tight themes and captivating improvisations. This means no show is the same, but an unforgettable party with Spull is always guaranteed!

profiles.name: Sonny & the Jets
profiles.description: Sonny & The Jets bring a lively mix of blues, rock, americana, soul, and roots music to the stage. Drawing from a wide range of influences, the Amsterdam-based band moves between gritty blues grooves, classic rock favourites, soulful melodies, and the occasional unexpected detour. Having cut their teeth in pubs and bars, Sonny & The Jets know how to build a set that keeps the energy up and the crowd engaged. Whether you're there to dance, sing along, or simply enjoy good live music, expect a performance full of groove, character, and a genuine love for great songs.

profiles.name: The Unemployed
profiles.description:
The Unemployed is an Amsterdam-based classic-rock band with a recognizable blend of influences from the 70s/80s, vocal harmonies, and guitar solos. Think The Faces, Herman Brood, and The Black Crowes. After their debut album, Slightly Tipped (2021), the band, in a revamped lineup, is working on new material and are ready to take the stage again.

In a world full of overproduced beats, they have a clear mission: to play as much as possible, to involve the audience in their energy, and to show that rock 'n' roll is far from dead.

profiles.name: Jam Session with the Improvinators
profiles.description: Jamsession every night after the program on the Rebel Stage until festival's closing time. The jamsessions here are legendary. We have a group of very good musicians carrying the jam. Tell musicians to come and join us. Please don't just jump on stage first contact the session leader.

profiles.name: The Beatzers
profiles.description: The Beatzers! In an era of blandness, they bring more style than many can even imagine. This five-member ensemble loves to surprise the audience with songs of varying caliber. And they do it all with a cheerful attitude. They play their ska, folk, and related genres with extra energy.

profiles.name: Flavour Coalition
profiles.description: Flavour Coalition is a multinational roots reggae band with six members from Amsterdam and the surrounding area. It's reggae music with a political message that fights against poverty, inequality, and corruption. The music has roots in Africa, South America, and Europe.

profiles.name: Jam session with Carlos Manso
profiles.description: Jamsession every night after the program on the Rebel Stage until festival's closing time. The jamsessions here are legendary. We have a group of very good musicians carrying the jam. Tell musicians to come and join us. Please don't just jump on stage first contact the session leader.

profiles.name: The Tearjerkers
profiles.description:
Paulisme and the "Tearjerkers" bring Dutch-language reggae/dub about love, life, and wonder. Besides his band The Amsterdelics, Paulisme has also played with De Porders (a theater/smartlaps-reggae project) and performed at Bevrijdingspop, Zwarte Cross, Paradiso, and Melkweg. His summer hit "De Zon" earned him a "Debut in a Minute" on 3FM in 2025.

PAUL VAN MUSSCHER, A.K.A. PAULISME, IS A VERSATILE SINGER/SONGWRITER, DJ, PRODUCER AND ORGANIZER WITHIN THE DUTCH DUB-, REGGAE- AND UNDERGROUND SCENE. WITH OVER THIRTY YEARS OF EXPERIENCE ON STAGES, FESTIVALS AND CLUBS, HE IS KNOWN FOR HIS ENERGIZING PERFORMANCE, SPONTANEOUS INTERACTION AND STRONG CONNECTION WITHIN THE COMMUNITY. AND NATURALLY AS THE FRONTMAN OF HIS OWN BAND, THE AMSTERDELICS. IN ADDITION TO HIS WORK AS AN ARTIST, PAUL ALSO ORGANIZES AND HOSTS EVENTS, PRODUCES HIS OWN MUSIC, AND WORKS WITH VARIOUS BANDS AND GUEST ARTISTS.

HIS PREVIOUS DUTCH-LANGUAGE PROJECT, DE PORDERS, WAS A TRIBUTE TO HIS NEPHEW JOHNNY JORDAAN. SMARTLAPS IN REGGAE AND ROCKSTEADY. IN A SOLD-OUT TREE IN CHICAGO, THEY PERFORMED THEIR THEATER SHOW ABOUT THE LIFE OF JOHNNY JORDAAN…

profiles.name: Wise Flower
profiles.description:
Amsterdam's Flower Power: Explosive groove and blossoming!

WiseFlower Band originated on the stages of Amsterdam. An international group with members from the Netherlands, Greece, Mexico, and Hungary, who play their own songs in a blend of blues and gospel, grooving into funk 'n' roll. The collected grooves travel through the vastness of space and time. It's time for Radical Change, so let's be Philosophical!

Left:
Website

profiles.name: Jam session with Jarne X Ris
profiles.description: Jamsession every night after the program on the Rebel Stage until festival's closing time. The jamsessions here are legendary. We have a group of very good musicians carrying the jam. Tell musicians to come and join us. Please don't just jump on stage first contact the session leader.

profiles.name: The Gritmoaners
profiles.description:
Gritmoaners featuring a performance by Walking Walter and Barbara Schroevers


The Gritmoaners is a roots and blues duo featuring Peter Lavell on guitar and vocals and Lilli Belle on harmonica. Known for their soulful performances and authentic sound, they bring a raw and heartfelt energy to the blues tradition. Their music pays homage to classic blues while infusing it with their own unique style. Whether in intimate venues or on festival stages, The Gritmoaners captivate audiences with their masterful musicianship and deep, resonant storytelling.


The Gritmoaners are a roots and blues duo featuring Peter Lavell on guitar and vocals and Lilli Belle on harmonica. Known for their soulful performances and authentic sound, they bring a raw and heartfelt energy to the blues tradition. Formed in 2018, their music pays homage to classic blues while infusing it with their own unique style. Whether in intimate venues or on festival stages, The Gritmoaners captivate audiences with their masterful musicianship and deep, resonant storytelling.

profiles.name: WRLDBEAT
profiles.description:
WRLDBEAT, based in Amsterdam and surrounding areas, blends funk, Latin, hip-hop, ska, reggae & soul in a dynamic musical melting pot. This nine-piece band brings together cultures and generations to create an explosive and unique sound that leaves no one unmoved.

The powerful vocals of Larissa, Stefanie, and Daan are central to their sound. These are enhanced by Mick's raw saxophone playing, the guitar work of Nico and Luke, Jort's deep bass, Carl's dynamic drumming, and Henk's fluid percussion.

While they may not be widely known to the general public, those in the know understand that WRLDBEAT guarantees unforgettable performances.

They have played at iconic venues such as Paradiso, Patronaat, and the A'DAM Tower, as well as at festivals like Parckpop and Rollende Keukens. With over 150 live shows, the band has proven its ability to make a lasting impression.

Let yourself be swept away by the rhythm, dynamism, and passion of WRLDBEAT – we are here on this earth to dance!

profiles.name: Jam session with Kim Stevenson
profiles.description: Jamsession every night after the program on the Rebel Stage until festival's closing time. The jamsessions here are legendary. We have a group of very good musicians carrying the jam. Tell musicians to come and join us. Please don't just jump on stage first contact the session leader.

profiles.name: Ralph de Jongh & Roos Kanis
profiles.description:
Roos Kanis & Ralph de Jong and magic friends - Shaman Blues

When the raw, soulful blues of Ralph de Jongh merges with the ceremonial, theatrical, and musical world of Roos Kanis, something new is created: Shaman Blues.

Ralph has been one of the most idiosyncratic blues artists in the Netherlands for years. With his deeply rooted voice, free-flowing playing, and deep roots in blues, rock, and roots music, he manages to turn every performance into a unique experience. His career has taken him to countless stages, festivals, and collaborations within the Dutch blues scene.

Roos brings another dimension: years of experience in ceremonial work, a treasure trove of songs from her traveling musical theater, and the creation of connecting experiences where music, story, and experience come together.

Together, they create not just a concert, but a musical journey. A performance where blues, groove, ceremony, and theater meet. The audience is taken on a trance of rhythm, soul, and play, where the boundary between artist and audience slowly fades away.

Shaman Blues is an invitation to meet yourself and others in a field of joy, freedom, love, and connection.…

profiles.name: HAN Here And Now
profiles.description:
HAN Here And Now is the musical project of singer and multi-instrumentalist Han van ’t Land. He plays world folk music, inspired by nature, (spiritual) journeys, and social themes. With his band, he creates music that moves between meditative stillness and powerful, energetic rhythms, built from acoustic and tribal sounds. Performances combine original songs with live looping and intuitive musical expression. The band consists of multi-instrumentalist Han van ’t Land, (bass) bassist Lucas Dols, and percussionist and handpan player Hashem Kabreet.

Links:
Website
Instagram

profiles.name: SUNN
profiles.description:
Musical hope, unity, and a rich palette of instruments.

SUNN brings a live performance that tells a story. A story about what we have experienced together, about the rising sun as a symbol of a new beginning, and about an explosion of energy. With a unique mix of acoustic and electronic elements, they create an immersive sound where passion is central. An intense musical experience that connects, touches, and inspires movement.

profiles.name: Lowfire
profiles.description:
music that moves like wind over dunes; scratching guitars and ethereal voices that turns horizons into dreamscapes.
 Located in Amsterdam, they get their sound from the clash between city life and cold seas, dunes, and misty meadows. They live like hibrids, looking into another dimension. Lowfire, right on the intersection; the end of a big flame and the start of a new one. You feel the smolthering heat, playing through their chords and melodies.

profiles.name: Sem Kramer & Cherry
profiles.description:
Cherry Sour (vocals), Sem Kramer (piano) and Mark Nieuwenhuis (trumpet) take over the Salon with their musicality.
 Sem and Mark open with an improvised set, fusing classical and jazz sounds. Cherry then brings songs about life, love, and everything in between. Expect to be taken away by their musicality.

profiles.name: Creatures on the Loose
profiles.description:
Ecstatic Trance Journey 
 A ritual of rhythm, rapture, and return to the essence 
 With rhythm and dance as their central medicine, the Creatures on the Loose invite you into a wild ritual of sound, sweat, and soul. Fusing tribal grooves, shamanic trance, ethereal soundscapes and deep live improvisation, their set is more than music—it’s a rite of liberation. Expect waves of pulsing energy, moments of deep surrender, and a call to awaken your inner animal. This is a primal celebration, a mythic dancefloor, a collective trance. So come—rise with your inner fire, and shake the wild creature within you loose.
 Links:
 Instagram

profiles.name: Kitano Band
profiles.description:
KITANO is a Mexican pianist, composer, and producer based in Amsterdam.
 This concert is the presentation of his new album, a journey through Jazz Fusion, Hip-Hop, Ambient, and Electronic music. Built around groove, improvisation, and rich textures, the project brings together some of the best musicians in Amsterdam, blending acoustic and electronic sounds in a way that feels both organic and contemporary.
 Rooted in groove as both a musical language and a communal experience, Kitano’s compositions invite listeners into a space where synthesizers, acoustic instruments, improvisation, and beat-driven rhythms coexist naturally. The music moves fluidly between intimate ambient moments, explosive fusion passages, and head-nodding hip-hop influences, reflecting the multicultural and genre-defying spirit of contemporary urban life.
 Inspired by experiences across Mexico, Paris, and Amsterdam, KITANO creates music that moves freely between genres while celebrating connection, spontaneity, and the joy of making music together.

profiles.name: Quintens's Birthday Bash
profiles.description:
Friday night in the Salon: en Quinten celebrates his birthday with his musical friends!

The Elements Fellowship:
Quinten Rutgers
Hassie Dune
Ania Brzezinskia
Wasim Arslan
Mame N'Diack Thiam
Arda Yesiltepe
Joao Vedana
Sumanth Manjunath
Tritha Sinha
Sharrif Simmons
DJ Grazzhoppa

profiles.name: Xamanoz
profiles.description:
Xamanoz is more than just a musical project – it's a meeting of souls, a sonic journey that travels through time, nature, and spirit. Formed by two brothers who met nearly 30 years ago, Xamanoz was born from a deep connection built through decades of friendship, shared experiences, and life paths.

From the beginning, music has been their central bond – not only as a form of expression, but also as a tool for transformation. Inspired by ancestral rhythms and the power of natural elements, they created their own language, where drums, diverse instruments, and original sounds intertwine to form unique soundscapes.

The sound of Xamanoz moves between worlds: from the pulsating energy of the forest to the mystical vibrations of Egypt, exploring dimensions beyond the physical. Each performance becomes a sensory experience, inviting the audience to dive deep within themselves while connecting to something greater.

Their music is alive, organic, and ritualistic – capable of leading into deep introspection or the ecstasy of dance, always guided by the intention to awaken, heal, and expand.

Above all, Xamanoz is a celebration of connection: between people, cultures, times, and elements…

profiles.name: Psychedelic Salon
profiles.description:
The Psychedelic Salon brings together researchers, practitioners, and those interested to explore the future of psychedelics in society. Once considered fringe, psychedelics are now moving into clinics, courtrooms, and cultural conversations — raising urgent questions about how we understand, integrate, and shape these experiences responsibly. At Landjuweel, Michiel van Elk, Annabelle Abraham, and Joost Breeksema share their perspectives on psychedelic futures, each followed by an open Q&A with the audience.
 Hosted by Daan Cowan-Keiman
 14:00 — Michiel van Elk, PhD
 “A 4E Perspective on Psychedelics: Challenges, Trends and the Future”
 How can we study something as complex and self-transformative as a psychedelic experience? And what should the future of psychedelic science look like? Michiel van Elk reflects on the current challenges in psychedelic research, including methodological problems, limited evidence for efficacy and safety, and challenges with regulatory frameworks. At the same time, he observes a movement towards increased medicalisation, a rise of the underground circuit, and increased interest in psychedelic retreats.…

profiles.name: Outdoor Stage with: Sylvia van Swieten, Mohammed Cissewko, Lasana Camera and Amara Diabate
Couple Positive
profiles.description:
Couple Positive Uplifting from Amsterdam! It's like tasting a delicious bonbon with the flavors of wild, funky groove rhythms, global soundscapes, and poetic melodies. Alongside the West African Electro N'goni that roars and swings, the trumpet and saxophone create inspiring notes. And on top of this raw spectacle, there are moving vocals and loops that steadily get you dancing...
 Become aware of an Uplifting experience

profiles.name: Heiko Dijker's Mandala Soul
profiles.description:
Igor Bezget: Guitar, Sarod, Oud, FX
 Simone Giaccomini: Keys, Guitar, Vocal, Modular
 Sharat Chandra Srivastava: Indian Violin
 Guro Kvernokk - Etherial Voice
 Heiko Dijker: Tabla, Konakol
 
 ALIEN ROOTS is the title of a space project that brings together 5 musicians from different parts of the Milky Way with a universal spectrum of Sound & Rhythm. Igor, Simone, Sharat and Heiko will take you through diverse sound worlds from Indian classical music to jazz and modern urban music to the influences of Roman stornellos, united by the desire for a unified sonic space, based both on the foundations of different musical traditions of the world, as well as on different approaches to otherworldly improvisation and composition, united by the futurism of electronic sounds.

profiles.name: Sharrif Simmons& Grazzhoppa
profiles.description:
Sharrif Simmons is a poet, musician, and member of the legendary The Last Poets. Together with turntablist DJ Grazzhoppa and live band, he performs spoken word full of rhythm, urgency, and the spirit of hip hop – where poetry, beats, and music come together.


Sharrif Simmons is a spoken word poet, author, and musician whose writing and performance career spans several decades. He emerged from New York City’s explosive spoken word poetry scene during the early 90’s and quickly made a name for himself performing alongside artists like Yassin Bey, Talib Kweli, and Saul Williams at popular New York venues such as Nuyorican Poets Café, Brooklyn Moon Café, CBGB's, The Blue Note, and Joe's Pub, to name a few. Sharrif is currently the newest member of the iconic poetry collective THE LAST POETS.

profiles.name: Yella Yellabow
profiles.description: Born in Amsterdam’s festival season, Yella Band fuses African roots with Western funk into 'afro-funk'. Fronted by Senegalese multi-talent Mame N’Diack Seck Thiam and Dutch bass artist Rosan Asmussen, the collective blends soulful storytelling, deep basslines, and a unique vocal language that transcends borders. Joined by Jur de Vries and Fabio Galeazzi, Yella Band creates danceable rhythms that celebrate unity through music. Music is medicine.

profiles.name: Tritha
profiles.description: A Sonic Alchemist. A journey from tradition to transcendence. An Indian classical & contemporary singer, composer, DJ & Sound Yogini based out of India and Europe. Invited at Cannes festival in 2019 and Oxford this summer, she also opened for Anoushka Shankar in London in June 2025. A prolific multi-genre discography of 18 albums, touring over 24 countries in Europe, America, Africa and Asia, her first album "PaGLi" released on Sony Music India. She has also been featured on BBC, Arte and Canal+ as a music activist. Founded a socially active collective SPACE bringing awareness of women empowerment in India. Magnum Photos from France featured her as one of the 100 Women Changing India. Tritha has been twice invited to Oxford University to demonstrate how sound impacts human consciousness. Her practice bridges 30 years of Indian classical training with Naad Yoga (the Yoga of Sound). Through retreats and workshops, she facilitates a method using ancient Indian sound wisdom to promote mental, emotional, and physical healing for individual and collective consciousness.…

profiles.name: Bradu
profiles.description: Bradu is a music project led by Sem van der Peet. What started as a jamsession evolved in a project where a group of friends come together in different formations to explore genres like jazz, hiphop, trap, fusion and house. Come and see this and put on your dancing shoes!!

profiles.name: Cedric Vermue
profiles.description: Cedric Vermue creates neo-classical and ambient music, where piano, strings, and electronic elements blend together to create a mesmerizing soundscape.
